descriptionHtml:
Come thrive at Tandems! At Tandems, we’re reimagining the future of financial advice. We empower financial advisors to deliver smarter, more human guidance by combining data, empathy, and artificial intelligence. Partnering with leading financial institutions, we deploy intelligent software and AI to enhance advisor productivity and deepen client relationships - enabling firms to deliver personalized advice at unprecedented scale.


After building one of the industry’s leading Digital Wealth platforms, we’ve evolved. Today, Tandems is an AI-first company, building intelligent tools that help advisors run better meetings, anticipate client needs, and make more informed decisions. Our solutions are trusted by some of the world’s largest and most innovative financial institutions, including Wells Fargo, New York Life, Scotiabank, and Citizens.


About the Team and Opportunity

As a Senior Product Manager at Tandems, you will help lead Tandems’ next chapter by embedding AI thinking and capabilities across our suite of products and shaping how financial advisors work in the age of intelligence.


This is a high-impact, cross-functional role at the heart of Tandems’ transformation. You’ll work closely with Engineering, Data Science, Design, Research, and Business stakeholders to define and deliver products that blend machine learning, behavioral insights, and human-centered design.


You’ll drive innovation not only within a specific product area but also across the company, influencing how we conceptualize and integrate AI across our ecosystem, from advisor tools to client engagement and portfolio management experiences.


Why Work for Us

  • We are 100+ employees strong and growing. Our world-class team is supported by an industry-savvy board and an executive team of diverse background and experience across financial services and technology.
  • We offer competitive benefits that include Flexible PTO, Wellness benefits, Mobile/Internet subsidy, Employee Recognition Programs, and more!
  • We are a remote-first company! We have regional hubs nationwide, with presence in 4 Countries: United States, Canada, India, and Singapore.
  • We embrace a culture that honors and celebrates diversity of backgrounds, approaches, and experiences.
  • We are guided by our core values: Customer Delight, Make It Happen, Think Big, and We Over Me. Read more about our core values and how we live them every day on our website here.


How You’ll Make an Impact

  • Shape the AI vision for advisor success: Lead the roadmap for products that use intelligence and automation to transform the financial advice industry.
  • Infuse AI across Tandems’ ecosystem: Partner with other Product, Engineering, and Data Science leaders to define how AI enhances user experiences and outcomes across all existing and future products.
  • Translate intelligence into action: Work with data scientists to turn model outputs into intuitive product experiences that create measurable real-world value.
  • Champion responsible AI: Define and advocate for principles around transparency, fairness, and explainability in every product we build.
  • Experiment and iterate: Use data and user feedback to drive hypotheses, run experiments, and evolve features that deliver measurable advisor and business impact.
  • Collaborate broadly: Partner across design, marketing, and customer success to ensure product experiences are cohesive, valuable, and aligned with Tandems’ mission.


Ideal Person for this Role

  • 5–10+ years in a product-focused role, ideally building and shipping enterprise, B2B, or platform products at scale.
  • Systems thinker with the ability to understand how product decisions influence data flows, adjacent teams, and end-to-end user journeys.
  • AI-curious and fluent, comfortable discussing models, ML-driven UX patterns, and data-powered product experiences (no coding required).
  • Human-centered mindset grounded in empathy, user research, and designing technology that enhances—not replaces—human expertise.
  • Strong analytical and research skills, leveraging both qualitative and quantitative insights to prioritize effectively and measure impact.
  • Execution excellence, with a track record of balancing strategy and detail, making tradeoffs, and delivering in fast-moving environments.
  • Technical curiosity, able to dive into data models, APIs, and system architecture to understand how intelligence becomes value.
  • Data-driven and outcome-oriented, using metrics, experimentation, and evidence to drive decisions.
  • Collaborative leadership, with extensive experience influencing and partnering across engineering, design, data, sales, marketing, and operations.
  • Exceptional communication skills and the ability to work effectively with remote or distributed teams; FinTech or startup experience is a plus.


Perks and Benefits

  • Tax-friendly Compensation
  • Liberal Leave Policy
  • Medical cover for the family, including parents
  • Quarterly Wellness Benefit
  • Mobile/Internet subsidy (for smooth WFH experience)


Tandems is backed by premier venture capital firms, including Bain Capital Ventures, General Atlantic, Nyca Partners, and Union Square Ventures as well as leading financial institutions including Wells Fargo, UBS, Santander, New York Life, and Comerica. We've raised over $100 million to support our growth as a leading technology provider to financial institutions.


© Nvest. All rights reserved, Tandems is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. We encourage people of different backgrounds, experiences, abilities and perspectives to apply.


San Francisco Applicants: Tandems will consider applicants with arrest and conviction records (criminal histories) in a manner consistent with the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance.

title: Principal Product Manager
workType: Information Technology, Engineering, and Product Management
description: WHO WE ARE:For enterprises struggling to secure cloud workloads, Aviatrix® offers a single solution for pervasive cloud security. Where current cybersecurity approaches focus on securing entry points to a trusted space, Aviatrix Cloud Native Security Fabric (CNSF) delivers runtime security and enforcement within the cloud application infrastructure itself – closing gaps between existing solutions and helping organizations regain visibility and control. Aviatrix ensures security, cloud, and networking teams are empowering developer velocity, AI, serverless, and what’s next. For more information, visit aviatrix.aiABOUT THE ROLE: Principal Product ManagerAs a Principal Product Manager at Aviatrix, you will serve as a recognized subject matter expert and thought leader, owning the strategy and long-term vision for a set of interrelated features and solution areas within our multi-cloud networking platform. You will drive significant initiatives that shape product value and market differentiation, influencing the product roadmap at the leadership level.Working closely with engineering, marketing, sales, and customers, you will identify emerging opportunities, make high-stakes prioritization decisions, and lead cross-functional collaboration that defines Aviatrix's competitive position across AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, and beyond.KEY RESPONSIBILITIESOwn and drive the long-term vision and comprehensive strategy for a set of interrelated features and solution areas, aligning them to the product's strategic goals, market position, and overall company vision.Influence the product roadmap at the leadership level by identifying future opportunities based on emerging industry trends, evolving user needs, and the competitive landscape.Engage regularly with enterprise customers, many of whom are based in the U.S., participating in product discussions, roadmap reviews, and strategic sessions; flexibility to schedule and attend meetings across time zones is expected.Establish prioritization frameworks for interdependent features that are adopted across product teams, and communicate rationale clearly to executive stakeholders.Make critical, high-stakes decisions on feature scope and strategic direction, balancing cross-functional input, market insights, and risk assessment to drive outcomes that impact the broader Product Management function.Lead execution across multiple interrelated features, overseeing project roadmaps, assigning responsibilities across teams, and establishing standards for quality delivery.Anticipate execution risks and adapt plans proactively based on resource or market changes, ensuring smooth cross-functional collaboration.Maintain deep customer focus by synthesizing feedback and real-world enterprise challenges into strategic product decisions, ensuring Aviatrix solutions address critical pain points at scale.Conduct competitive analysis and market research to keep Aviatrix at the forefront of enterprise cloud networking and security.Drive strategic-level communication across functions, providing detailed roadmap updates, vision presentations, and reports to leadership and executive teams.Partner with ecosystem partners and internal teams to validate strategy and deliver measurable, impactful results.Evangelize Aviatrix's solutions as an internal and external subject matter expert through thought leadership, technical white papers, webinars, and speaking engagements.Mentor and develop junior product managers on execution, collaboration, and strategic thinking best practices.QUALIFICATIONSBachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent experience; Master's degree preferred.12+ years of experience in product management within the cloud or networking domain, with a demonstrated track record of driving product strategy at scale (or 8+ years with a Master's degree).Broad expertise and deep specialization in cloud networking technologies, including VPN, SDN, SD-WAN, firewalls, routing protocols, TCP/IP, DNS, IPSec, and cloud-native networking across AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.Proven experience leading strategy and execution for a set of interrelated features or product areas, with direct influence on long-term product roadmap and business outcomes.Experience with multi-cloud architectures, networking protocols, and infrastructure as code (IaC) tools.Hands-on experience with at least two major cloud platforms (e.g., AWS Networking, Azure Networking, Google Cloud Networking).Recognized ability to lead cross-functional collaboration, build consensus, and influence stakeholders up to the executive level.Exceptional communication skills with the ability to translate complex technical concepts into strategic narratives for diverse audiences, including C-suite.Experience mentoring and developing junior product managers.Willingness and ability to work flexible hours to accommodate meetings with customers and stakeholders based in the U.S. and other global time zones.
descriptionHtml:
WHO WE ARE:

For enterprises struggling to secure cloud workloads, Aviatrix® offers a single solution for pervasive cloud security. Where current cybersecurity approaches focus on securing entry points to a trusted space, Aviatrix Cloud Native Security Fabric (CNSF) delivers runtime security and enforcement within the cloud application infrastructure itself – closing gaps between existing solutions and helping organizations regain visibility and control. Aviatrix ensures security, cloud, and networking teams are empowering developer velocity, AI, serverless, and what’s next. For more information, visit aviatrix.ai


ABOUT THE ROLE: Principal Product Manager

As a Principal Product Manager at Aviatrix, you will serve as a recognized subject matter expert and thought leader, owning the strategy and long-term vision for a set of interrelated features and solution areas within our multi-cloud networking platform. You will drive significant initiatives that shape product value and market differentiation, influencing the product roadmap at the leadership level.

Working closely with engineering, marketing, sales, and customers, you will identify emerging opportunities, make high-stakes prioritization decisions, and lead cross-functional collaboration that defines Aviatrix's competitive position across AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, and beyond.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Own and drive the long-term vision and comprehensive strategy for a set of interrelated features and solution areas, aligning them to the product's strategic goals, market position, and overall company vision.
  • Influence the product roadmap at the leadership level by identifying future opportunities based on emerging industry trends, evolving user needs, and the competitive landscape.
  • Engage regularly with enterprise customers, many of whom are based in the U.S., participating in product discussions, roadmap reviews, and strategic sessions; flexibility to schedule and attend meetings across time zones is expected.
  • Establish prioritization frameworks for interdependent features that are adopted across product teams, and communicate rationale clearly to executive stakeholders.
  • Make critical, high-stakes decisions on feature scope and strategic direction, balancing cross-functional input, market insights, and risk assessment to drive outcomes that impact the broader Product Management function.
  • Lead execution across multiple interrelated features, overseeing project roadmaps, assigning responsibilities across teams, and establishing standards for quality delivery.
  • Anticipate execution risks and adapt plans proactively based on resource or market changes, ensuring smooth cross-functional collaboration.
  • Maintain deep customer focus by synthesizing feedback and real-world enterprise challenges into strategic product decisions, ensuring Aviatrix solutions address critical pain points at scale.
  • Conduct competitive analysis and market research to keep Aviatrix at the forefront of enterprise cloud networking and security.
  • Drive strategic-level communication across functions, providing detailed roadmap updates, vision presentations, and reports to leadership and executive teams.
  • Partner with ecosystem partners and internal teams to validate strategy and deliver measurable, impactful results.
  • Evangelize Aviatrix's solutions as an internal and external subject matter expert through thought leadership, technical white papers, webinars, and speaking engagements.
  • Mentor and develop junior product managers on execution, collaboration, and strategic thinking best practices.


QUALIFICATIONS

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent experience; Master's degree preferred.
  • 12+ years of experience in product management within the cloud or networking domain, with a demonstrated track record of driving product strategy at scale (or 8+ years with a Master's degree).
  • Broad expertise and deep specialization in cloud networking technologies, including VPN, SDN, SD-WAN, firewalls, routing protocols, TCP/IP, DNS, IPSec, and cloud-native networking across AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.
  • Proven experience leading strategy and execution for a set of interrelated features or product areas, with direct influence on long-term product roadmap and business outcomes.
  • Experience with multi-cloud architectures, networking protocols, and infrastructure as code (IaC) tools.
  • Hands-on experience with at least two major cloud platforms (e.g., AWS Networking, Azure Networking, Google Cloud Networking).
  • Recognized ability to lead cross-functional collaboration, build consensus, and influence stakeholders up to the executive level.
  • Exceptional communication skills with the ability to translate complex technical concepts into strategic narratives for diverse audiences, including C-suite.
  • Experience mentoring and developing junior product managers.
  • Willingness and ability to work flexible hours to accommodate meetings with customers and stakeholders based in the U.S. and other global time zones.

title: Senior Product Manager/Product Manager - Platform
description: About WatiStarted as a WhatsApp team inbox in 2020, Wati has evolved into a full revenue orchestration system that goes beyond a single platform. We empower businesses that sell, support, and grow through conversations by observing customer intent in real-time, deciding the next best revenue action, and executing it seamlessly across marketing, sales, and support—all within WhatsApp and connected messaging channels.Our Platform & AI CapabilitiesWati is designed for scalability and intelligence. Our AI-native platform simplifies complex customer communication operations through a unified inbox, a robust multi-channel messaging infrastructure, and no-code automation. At the heart of our solution is Astra, our intelligent AI layer, which helps you create AI Agents for all customer interactions and all your messaging platforms. By integrating AI agents into the ecosystem, we enable businesses of all sizes to deliver measurable ROI and build deeper customer relationships.Our Backing & Partnerships Trusted by over 16,000 customers across 190+ countries, Wati is proudly backed by world-class investors including Tiger Global, Sequoia Capital, DST Global, and Shopify. As a Premium-tier Partner of Meta and Google, we maintain the highest standards of platform excellence and integration.About The RoleWati is growing rapidly and we are looking to hire a Senior Product Manager to help scale our product offerings and work with our product and engineering teams to develop and execute our shared product vision. We are looking for extremely entrepreneurial PMs who value moving quickly.If you have demonstrated experience building APIs & MCPs, understand developer communities, have empathy for both consumers and businesses and want to unlock the potential for messaging to serve millions of customers, we would be excited to hear from you.This will be an opportunity for you to build experiences that thousands of small businesses use on a daily basis, and to be a key part of this high growth journey.What you'll do:  Own the product strategy and roadmap for building native integrations, strong APIs and an Agent friendly platform Identify high-impact integration and ecosystem opportunities by analyzing developer needs, Agent behaviours, partner platforms, and competitive landscapes Work closely with engineering to define APIs, SDKs, auth, and extensibility primitives that scale and are easy to adopt Build a product-led partnerships strategy that turns integrations into a repeatable demand and revenue channel Lead 0→1 and early-scale experiments for new integrations, marketplaces and communities; measuring adoption, activation, and revenue impact Collaborate with sales, partnership and marketing teams to launch, position, and grow integrations and drive adoption amongst developer communities Synthesize learnings and present clear recommendations to leadershipRequirementsExperience as a Senior Product Manager at a scale or growth-stage company, ideally on developer, platform, or ecosystem productsStrong technical product judgment; comfortable working with AI platforms, APIs, MCPs, integrations, LLM tooling, and developer and agentic workflowsTrack record of launching new platforms and iterating based on real usage and dataAbility to operate with ambiguity while building systems that scaleData-driven mindset with clear communication and stakeholder management skillsNice to have:Experience at a startup or high-growth scaleupCoding or SQL experience — you don't need to ship code, but you can read it and get your own answers from dataFamiliarity with the messaging, CPaaS, or WhatsApp ecosystemBachelor's in Computer Science or a related technical field
descriptionHtml:
About Wati

Started as a WhatsApp team inbox in 2020, Wati has evolved into a full revenue orchestration system that goes beyond a single platform. We empower businesses that sell, support, and grow through conversations by observing customer intent in real-time, deciding the next best revenue action, and executing it seamlessly across marketing, sales, and support—all within WhatsApp and connected messaging channels.

Our Platform & AI Capabilities

Wati is designed for scalability and intelligence. Our AI-native platform simplifies complex customer communication operations through a unified inbox, a robust multi-channel messaging infrastructure, and no-code automation. At the heart of our solution is Astra, our intelligent AI layer, which helps you create AI Agents for all customer interactions and all your messaging platforms. By integrating AI agents into the ecosystem, we enable businesses of all sizes to deliver measurable ROI and build deeper customer relationships.

Our Backing & Partnerships

Trusted by over 16,000 customers across 190+ countries, Wati is proudly backed by world-class investors including Tiger Global, Sequoia Capital, DST Global, and Shopify. As a Premium-tier Partner of Meta and Google, we maintain the highest standards of platform excellence and integration.

About The Role

Wati is growing rapidly and we are looking to hire a Senior Product Manager to help scale our product offerings and work with our product and engineering teams to develop and execute our shared product vision. We are looking for extremely entrepreneurial PMs who value moving quickly.

If you have demonstrated experience building APIs & MCPs, understand developer communities, have empathy for both consumers and businesses and want to unlock the potential for messaging to serve millions of customers, we would be excited to hear from you.

This will be an opportunity for you to build experiences that thousands of small businesses use on a daily basis, and to be a key part of this high growth journey.

What you'll do:

  • Own the product strategy and roadmap for building native integrations, strong APIs and an Agent friendly platform
  • Identify high-impact integration and ecosystem opportunities by analyzing developer needs, Agent behaviours, partner platforms, and competitive landscapes
  • Work closely with engineering to define APIs, SDKs, auth, and extensibility primitives that scale and are easy to adopt
  • Build a product-led partnerships strategy that turns integrations into a repeatable demand and revenue channel
  • Lead 0→1 and early-scale experiments for new integrations, marketplaces and communities; measuring adoption, activation, and revenue impact
  • Collaborate with sales, partnership and marketing teams to launch, position, and grow integrations and drive adoption amongst developer communities
  • Synthesize learnings and present clear recommendations to leadership

Requirements

  • Experience as a Senior Product Manager at a scale or growth-stage company, ideally on developer, platform, or ecosystem products
  • Strong technical product judgment; comfortable working with AI platforms, APIs, MCPs, integrations, LLM tooling, and developer and agentic workflows
  • Track record of launching new platforms and iterating based on real usage and data
  • Ability to operate with ambiguity while building systems that scale
  • Data-driven mindset with clear communication and stakeholder management skills

Nice to have:

  • Experience at a startup or high-growth scaleup
  • Coding or SQL experience — you don't need to ship code, but you can read it and get your own answers from data
  • Familiarity with the messaging, CPaaS, or WhatsApp ecosystem
  • Bachelor's in Computer Science or a related technical field

title: Senior Product Manager- Remote
description: Who are are:Cimpress Technology develops cutting-edge, best-in-world software that our mass customization businesses use to create personalized products for millions of global customers. Our Mass Customization Platform (MCP) consists of modular, multi-tenant services. Our businesses include a dozen brands such as Vistaprint, National Pen and Box Up. These businesses can choose the solutions that work for them, or assemble any custom combination they need. This makes it easier and faster to do things like introduce new products, reach customers and track orders. This kind of innovation keeps customers coming back. Just last year, Cimpress generated $3.2B in revenue through customized print products, signage, apparel, packaging and more.Our Team:The Access team plays a critical role in securing and enabling the Mass Customization Platform (MCP), the technology backbone that powers Cimpress businesses such as Vistaprint, National Pen, and others.Access is responsible for onboarding businesses, managing users, and safeguarding the platform through robust Identity, Authentication, Tenancy, Account Management, Authorization, and Risk Intelligence and Compliance solutions. Our systems ensure that every person, service, and application that intends and is permitted to connect with MCP can do so securely and operate with the right level of trust and control.As a Senior Product Manager in the Access team, you will own the product direction and execution for critical functional areas within our Identity and Access Management (IAM) and extended portfolio. You will serve as the bridge between high-level platform strategy and on-the-ground execution, delivering secure, scalable, and developer-centric solutions. You will take ownership of complex problem spaces such as identity, authentication, authorization, tenancy, and risk intelligence and drive them from vague requirements to successful global adoption. You will act as a trusted partner to engineering and security architects, and business teams making data-informed trade-offs between security rigor, compliance, and user experience. In this role, you will operate with a high degree of autonomy, and influence stakeholders across Cimpress businesses. You will ensure that our authentication and authorization services evolve to support emerging technologies, including AI agents and third-party ecosystem integrations.What You Will DoDefine and execute the quarterly and annual product roadmap for significant components of the Access products. Translate high-level strategic goals into detailed, actionable plans.Lead deep-dive discovery with Cimpress business units to identify unarticulated needs. Use data, market research, and competitive analysis to validate hypotheses and prioritize high-impact features.Lead continuous market research, competitive analysis, and engagement with partner teams and business units across the company to identify and prioritize high-impact opportunities, define business cases, and lead 'build vs. buy' evaluations for critical Access related product technologies.Collaborate with engineering to translate the large-scale initiatives into a clear, prioritized backlog of measurable outcomes.Comply with the UX principles of the Access products, ensuring our APIs, SDKs, and tools are intuitive, well-documented, and easy to integrate. Champion a secure, scalable, and API-first foundation for the products you manage.Collaborate across the organization with business units, platform teams, and stakeholders to ensure Access solutions meet real-world needs while balancing security, usability, and scalability.Collaborate with engineers and architects on system design, API contracts, and architectural decisions and negotiate technical tradeoffs.Measure and improve outcomes using adoption metrics, platform performance data, and customer feedback to continuously refine product features and operational processes.Manage expectations with stakeholders across Cimpress businesses, communicating progress, risks, and changes effectively.What Will Make You A Great Candidate9-14 years of professional experience, including 5+ years as a Product Manager, ideally working on complex, high-quality B2B or B2C web-based products, preferably in the SaaS space.Deep domain expertise and proven track record in Identity & Access Management (IAM), Authentication protocols (OAuth, OIDC, SAML), Granular Application Access Control, Security and Compliance, Role-based Access Management, Policy-based Access Management, or Platform tenancy.You prioritize understanding user and business needs and translate insights into intuitive, secure, and reliable product experiences for both internal and external users.Strong sense of UI/UX principles, development frameworks, functional design, and familiarity with tools and platforms used for product development. You have good tech grasp and are able to collaborate meaningfully with business users, engineers, architects, and security teams.Demonstrated ability to translate complex, ambiguous customer and business needs into clear product requirements and milestones.Leverage quantitative and qualitative insights to inform decisions, measure outcomes, and continuously improve product quality and usability.Exceptional skills in partnership, communication, presentation, and influencing across diverse teams and stakeholders. You can build consensus and drive decisions among the product cross functional team.Exceptional technical acumen and ability to collaborate meaningfully with engineers and architects on system design, API contracts, and architectural decisions.Proven track record of managing a portfolio of technical, API-first platform products through the full lifecycle, from ideation to deprecation.Some Nice To HavesBachelor’s degree in Computer/IT/Electronics Engineering and/or previous s/w development experience is a huge advantageMBA from a Tier-1/Tier-2 Business School.Deep working knowledge of one or more of the these areas: SAML, OAuth, OpenID Connect, Social SignOn, SSO, LDAP, Okta, Auth0, integrating with API-first productsAbility to create concept wireframes.Exposure to Agentic AI productsWhat’s In It For You (besides the best in-class rewards):An Opportunity to be a part of the global market leader in the mass customization industry.A chance to GROW professionally building technology solutions for a largely unorganized market.A system that EMPOWERS each member with a high degree of trust, freedom and autonomy.A GLOBAL team that has some of the best minds in product, data and engineering.A REMOTE-FIRST operating model and impeccable culture.Why you will love working hereBeing at Cimpress means that you don’t see work as just a building, a desk or a manufacturing floor. You see it as a chance to take a step forward in your career journey – and your life. We strive to give you everything you need to learn, grow, and succeed. Through innovation, collaboration, and perpetual exposure to what’s next, we’re always pushing boundaries and broadening our horizons. We embrace the chance to operate outside of our comfort zone to discover what we’re capable of. Some might call that a challenge; we just call it another great day at work.We will help you define a clear perception of how to make the most of what you do best.Equal Opportunity Employer:Cimpress is an Equal Employment Opportunity Employer. All qualified candidates will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, sex, national or ethnic origin, nationality, age, religion, citizenship, disability, medical condition, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender presentation, legal or preferred name, marital status, pregnancy, family structure, veteran status or any other basis protected by human rights laws or regulations. This list is not exhaustive and, in fact, in many cases, we strive to do more than the law requires.We're Remote-FirstIn 2020, Cimpress adopted a Remote-First operating model and culture. We heard from our team members that having the freedom, autonomy, and trust in each other to work from home and the ability to operate when they are most productive, empowers them to be their best.Please visit our company website to learn more about Cimpress and how we empower people to make an impression through mass customization by delivering uniquely personalized products in a convenient and affordable way. You'll find detailed insights into our entrepreneurial approach, global operations, and commitment to innovation at cimpress.com.

The Access team plays a critical role in securing and enabling the Mass Customization Platform (MCP), the technology backbone that powers Cimpress businesses such as Vistaprint, National Pen, and others.

Access is responsible for onboarding businesses, managing users, and safeguarding the platform through robust Identity, Authentication, Tenancy, Account Management, Authorization, and Risk Intelligence and Compliance solutions. Our systems ensure that every person, service, and application that intends and is permitted to connect with MCP can do so securely and operate with the right level of trust and control.


As a Senior Product Manager in the Access team, you will own the product direction and execution for critical functional areas within our Identity and Access Management (IAM) and extended portfolio. You will serve as the bridge between high-level platform strategy and on-the-ground execution, delivering secure, scalable, and developer-centric solutions.

You will take ownership of complex problem spaces such as identity, authentication, authorization, tenancy, and risk intelligence and drive them from vague requirements to successful global adoption. You will act as a trusted partner to engineering and security architects, and business teams making data-informed trade-offs between security rigor, compliance, and user experience.

In this role, you will operate with a high degree of autonomy, and influence stakeholders across Cimpress businesses. You will ensure that our authentication and authorization services evolve to support emerging technologies, including AI agents and third-party ecosystem integrations.


What You Will Do

  • Define and execute the quarterly and annual product roadmap for significant components of the Access products. Translate high-level strategic goals into detailed, actionable plans.
  • Lead deep-dive discovery with Cimpress business units to identify unarticulated needs. Use data, market research, and competitive analysis to validate hypotheses and prioritize high-impact features.
  • Lead continuous market research, competitive analysis, and engagement with partner teams and business units across the company to identify and prioritize high-impact opportunities, define business cases, and lead 'build vs. buy' evaluations for critical Access related product technologies.
  • Collaborate with engineering to translate the large-scale initiatives into a clear, prioritized backlog of measurable outcomes.
  • Comply with the UX principles of the Access products, ensuring our APIs, SDKs, and tools are intuitive, well-documented, and easy to integrate. Champion a secure, scalable, and API-first foundation for the products you manage.
  • Collaborate across the organization with business units, platform teams, and stakeholders to ensure Access solutions meet real-world needs while balancing security, usability, and scalability.
  • Collaborate with engineers and architects on system design, API contracts, and architectural decisions and negotiate technical tradeoffs.
  • Measure and improve outcomes using adoption metrics, platform performance data, and customer feedback to continuously refine product features and operational processes.
  • Manage expectations with stakeholders across Cimpress businesses, communicating progress, risks, and changes effectively.


What Will Make You A Great Candidate

  • 9-14 years of professional experience, including 5+ years as a Product Manager, ideally working on complex, high-quality B2B or B2C web-based products, preferably in the SaaS space.
  • Deep domain expertise and proven track record in Identity & Access Management (IAM), Authentication protocols (OAuth, OIDC, SAML), Granular Application Access Control, Security and Compliance, Role-based Access Management, Policy-based Access Management, or Platform tenancy.
  • You prioritize understanding user and business needs and translate insights into intuitive, secure, and reliable product experiences for both internal and external users.
  • Strong sense of UI/UX principles, development frameworks, functional design, and familiarity with tools and platforms used for product development. You have good tech grasp and are able to collaborate meaningfully with business users, engineers, architects, and security teams.
  • Demonstrated ability to translate complex, ambiguous customer and business needs into clear product requirements and milestones.
  • Leverage quantitative and qualitative insights to inform decisions, measure outcomes, and continuously improve product quality and usability.
  • Exceptional skills in partnership, communication, presentation, and influencing across diverse teams and stakeholders. You can build consensus and drive decisions among the product cross functional team.
  • Exceptional technical acumen and ability to collaborate meaningfully with engineers and architects on system design, API contracts, and architectural decisions.
  • Proven track record of managing a portfolio of technical, API-first platform products through the full lifecycle, from ideation to deprecation.


Some Nice To Haves

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer/IT/Electronics Engineering and/or previous s/w development experience is a huge advantage
  • MBA from a Tier-1/Tier-2 Business School.
  • Deep working knowledge of one or more of the these areas: SAML, OAuth, OpenID Connect, Social SignOn, SSO, LDAP, Okta, Auth0, integrating with API-first products
  • Ability to create concept wireframes.
  • Exposure to Agentic AI products


What’s In It For You (besides the best in-class rewards):

  • An Opportunity to be a part of the global market leader in the mass customization industry.
  • A chance to GROW professionally building technology solutions for a largely unorganized market.
  • A system that EMPOWERS each member with a high degree of trust, freedom and autonomy.
  • A GLOBAL team that has some of the best minds in product, data and engineering.
  • A REMOTE-FIRST operating model and impeccable culture.


Why you will love working here

Being at Cimpress means that you don’t see work as just a building, a desk or a manufacturing floor. You see it as a chance to take a step forward in your career journey – and your life. We strive to give you everything you need to learn, grow, and succeed. Through innovation, collaboration, and perpetual exposure to what’s next, we’re always pushing boundaries and broadening our horizons. We embrace the chance to operate outside of our comfort zone to discover what we’re capable of. Some might call that a challenge; we just call it another great day at work.

We will help you define a clear perception of how to make the most of what you do best.


Equal Opportunity Employer:

Cimpress is an Equal Employment Opportunity Employer. All qualified candidates will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, sex, national or ethnic origin, nationality, age, religion, citizenship, disability, medical condition, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender presentation, legal or preferred name, marital status, pregnancy, family structure, veteran status or any other basis protected by human rights laws or regulations. This list is not exhaustive and, in fact, in many cases, we strive to do more than the law requires.


We're Remote-First

In 2020, Cimpress adopted a Remote-First operating model and culture. We heard from our team members that having the freedom, autonomy, and trust in each other to work from home and the ability to operate when they are most productive, empowers them to be their best.

Please visit our company website to learn more about Cimpress and how we empower people to make an impression through mass customization by delivering uniquely personalized products in a convenient and affordable way. You'll find detailed insights into our entrepreneurial approach, global operations, and commitment to innovation at cimpress.com.

descriptionHtml:
About Pocket Entertainment


Pocket Entertainment is a global leader in immersive audio storytelling, creating richly produced narrative experiences that engage millions of listeners across the world.

With over 100 billion minutes streamed annually, an average of 120 minutes of daily listening time, and more than 6 billion total audio plays, Pocket FM is on a mission to build the world’s largest AI-powered audio streaming platform, powered by a thriving community of 250,000+ creators. The platform continues to see rapid growth in the US and India, with strong expansion momentum across Europe and LATAM.


Our mission is to redefine the future of storytelling by empowering writers and creators worldwide with next-generation AI tools, from story generation co-pilots and seamless multilingual adaptations to expressive voice synthesis and creative tooling for image and video generation. As an AI-first company, we’re building and deploying proprietary generative AI models that power our entire value chain, spanning content creation, curation, marketing, distribution, and monetization.


What you’ll own?


  • Own and drive the strategy and roadmap for creators experience & retention on the platform for your charter
  • Partner cross-functionally with engineering, design, data, business & analytics to ship high-quality, impactful product features
  • Use data and user insights to inform prioritization and continuously iterate on product experiences
  • Effectively communicate complex ideas, fostering alignment among leadership and cross-functional teams
  • Collaborate with various product teams to develop solutions to shared challenges across multiple product lines
  • Ensure the pod delivers measurable impact on creator retention, user growth and revenue for the company


What we’re looking for?


  • 5+ years of product management experience, ideally in B2C. Previous experience in working on creator facing products is a plus
  • Proficient in analytical thinking and problem-solving, skilled at converting data insights into
  • Growth mindset with a passion for experimentation, A/B testing, user empathy and rapid iteration
  • Proficient in analytical thinking and problem-solving, skilled at converting data insights into practical strategies
  • Deep passion for designing and delivering exceptionally pleasing user experiences
  • Excellent cross-functional leadership: Engineering, Business, Design, and GTM teams
  • Deep passion for entertainment, storytelling, content creation, or the creator economy

title: Senior Product Manager

That’s what we do at Walmart Global Tech. By fostering a workplace culture where everyone is—and feels—included, everyone wins. Our associates and customers reflect the makeup of all 19 countries where we operate. By making Walmart a welcoming place where all people feel like they belong, we’re able to engage associates, strengthen our business, improve our ability to serve customers, and support the communities where we operate.Equal Opportunity EmployerWalmart, Inc., is an Equal Opportunities Employer – By Choice. If none are listed, there are no minimum qualifications.Option 1: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, engineering, or related area and 5 years’ experience in product management. Option 2: 7 years’ experience in product management or related area.Preferred Qualifications...Outlined below are the optional preferred qualifications for this position. If none are listed, there are no preferred qualifications.Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Business Administration, or related area and 4 years’ experience as a product manager, ideally working on consumer-facing, large-scale, highly complex B2B/C productsMasters: Business Administration, Masters: Business Administration, Masters: Business Administration, Masters: Business Administration, Masters: Business AdministrationPrimary Location...Block- 1, Prestige Tech Pacific Park, Sy No. 38/1, Outer Ring Rd Kadubeesanahalli , India
descriptionHtml:
About Team:

US Omni Tech at Walmart Global Tech, Bengaluru, is focused on improving Walmart customer experience across both physical & digital and making Walmart the most exciting place to shop. With 4000+ brick and mortar stores and thousands of other suppliers fulfilling Walmart's online/in-store orders for over 1 billion customers - the challenge and complexity is pronounced! We work within the world’s largest retailer yet maintain a startup feel working in small agile teams to revolutionize the fulfilment landscape. As a leader in the supply chain group, you are accountable and responsible for number of critical products/platforms that help serve our customers in the most cost-effective manner in multiple geographies and businesses.

What you'll do:

Assist in defining product features and translating business needs into user stories and technical requirements.

Partner with engineering and QA teams to plan sprints and ensure timely, high-quality delivery.

Analyze data and feedback to prioritize feature enhancements and resolve issues.

Work with internal stakeholders (e.g., logistics, inventory, store operations) to gather and clarify requirements.

Support in developing product documentation, training materials, and internal communication plans.

Drive product capabilities and roadmap with very minimal supervision and guidance

Be technically savvy to build and grow technical platforms and products as well as contribute to engineering conversations & priorities in a scrappy, ambiguous start-up environment

Be an advocate of metric/data-based decision making, Make impact on a global scale.

Promotes and supports mission, values, and standards of ethics and integrity.

What you'll bring:

You come with 5+ years of product management experience.

Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work in a cross-functional team

Experience with eCommerce or internet-based products is a plus.

Excellent communication and stakeholder management.

Uncompromising commitment to the customer.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills with ability to champion product solutions throughout the organization.

Advanced/ master’s degree in engineering or management is preferred.

About Walmart Global Tech

Imagine working in an environment where one line of code can make life easier for hundreds of millions of people. That’s what we do at Walmart Global Tech. We’re a team of software engineers, data scientists, cybersecurity expert's and service professionals within the world’s leading retailer who make an epic impact and are at the forefront of the next retail disruption. People are why we innovate, and people power our innovations. We are people-led and tech-empowered.

We train our team in the skillsets of the future and bring in experts like you to help us grow. We have roles for those chasing their first opportunity as well as those looking for the opportunity that will define their career. Here, you can kickstart a great career in tech, gain new skills and experience for virtually every industry, or leverage your expertise to innovate at scale, impact millions and reimagine the future of retail.

Walmart’s culture sets us apart, and we know being together helps us innovate, learn and grow great careers. This role is based in our Bangalore office for daily work, with the flexibility for associates to manage their personal lives.

Benefits

Beyond our great compensation package, you can receive incentive awards for your performance. Other great perks include a host of best-in-class benefits maternity and parental leave, PTO, health benefits, and much more.

Belonging

We aim to create a culture where every associate feels valued for who they are, rooted in respect for the individual. Our goal is to foster a sense of belonging, to create opportunities for all our associates, customers and suppliers, and to be a Walmart for everyone.

At Walmart, our vision is "everyone included." By fostering a workplace culture where everyone is—and feels—included, everyone wins. Our associates and customers reflect the makeup of all 19 countries where we operate. By making Walmart a welcoming place where all people feel like they belong, we’re able to engage associates, strengthen our business, improve our ability to serve customers, and support the communities where we operate.

Equal Opportunity Employer

Walmart, Inc., is an Equal Opportunities Employer – By Choice. We believe we are best equipped to help our associates, customers and the communities we serve live better when we really know them. That means understanding, respecting and valuing unique styles, experiences, identities, ideas and opinions – while being inclusive

Minimum Qualifications...Outlined below are the required minimum qualifications for this position. If none are listed, there are no minimum qualifications.

Option 1: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, engineering, or related area and 5 years’ experience in product management. Option 2: 7 years’ experience in product management or related area.

Preferred Qualifications...Outlined below are the optional preferred qualifications for this position. If none are listed, there are no preferred qualifications.

Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Business Administration, or related area and 4 years’ experience as a product manager, ideally working on consumer-facing, large-scale, highly complex B2B/C products

Masters: Business Administration, Masters: Business Administration, Masters: Business Administration, Masters: Business Administration, Masters: Business Administration

Primary Location...Block- 1, Prestige Tech Pacific Park, Sy No. 38/1, Outer Ring Rd Kadubeesanahalli , India

title: Senior Product Manager/Product Manager - Platform
description: About WatiStarted as a WhatsApp team inbox in 2020, Wati has evolved into a full revenue orchestration system that goes beyond a single platform. We empower businesses that sell, support, and grow through conversations by observing customer intent in real-time, deciding the next best revenue action, and executing it seamlessly across marketing, sales, and support—all within WhatsApp and connected messaging channels.Our Platform & AI CapabilitiesWati is designed for scalability and intelligence. Our AI-native platform simplifies complex customer communication operations through a unified inbox, a robust multi-channel messaging infrastructure, and no-code automation. At the heart of our solution is Astra, our intelligent AI layer, which helps you create AI Agents for all customer interactions and all your messaging platforms. By integrating AI agents into the ecosystem, we enable businesses of all sizes to deliver measurable ROI and build deeper customer relationships.Our Backing & Partnerships Trusted by over 16,000 customers across 190+ countries, Wati is proudly backed by world-class investors including Tiger Global, Sequoia Capital, DST Global, and Shopify. As a Premium-tier Partner of Meta and Google, we maintain the highest standards of platform excellence and integration.About The RoleWati is growing rapidly and we are looking to hire a Senior Product Manager to help scale our product offerings and work with our product and engineering teams to develop and execute our shared product vision. We are looking for extremely entrepreneurial PMs who value moving quickly.If you have demonstrated experience building APIs & MCPs, understand developer communities, have empathy for both consumers and businesses and want to unlock the potential for messaging to serve millions of customers, we would be excited to hear from you.This will be an opportunity for you to build experiences that thousands of small businesses use on a daily basis, and to be a key part of this high growth journey.What you'll do:  Own the product strategy and roadmap for building native integrations, strong APIs and an Agent friendly platform Identify high-impact integration and ecosystem opportunities by analyzing developer needs, Agent behaviours, partner platforms, and competitive landscapes Work closely with engineering to define APIs, SDKs, auth, and extensibility primitives that scale and are easy to adopt Build a product-led partnerships strategy that turns integrations into a repeatable demand and revenue channel Lead 0→1 and early-scale experiments for new integrations, marketplaces and communities; measuring adoption, activation, and revenue impact Collaborate with sales, partnership and marketing teams to launch, position, and grow integrations and drive adoption amongst developer communities Synthesize learnings and present clear recommendations to leadershipRequirementsExperience as a Senior Product Manager at a scale or growth-stage company, ideally on developer, platform, or ecosystem productsStrong technical product judgment; comfortable working with AI platforms, APIs, MCPs, integrations, LLM tooling, and developer and agentic workflowsTrack record of launching new platforms and iterating based on real usage and dataAbility to operate with ambiguity while building systems that scaleData-driven mindset with clear communication and stakeholder management skillsNice to have:Experience at a startup or high-growth scaleupCoding or SQL experience — you don't need to ship code, but you can read it and get your own answers from dataFamiliarity with the messaging, CPaaS, or WhatsApp ecosystemBachelor's in Computer Science or a related technical field
descriptionHtml:
About Wati

Started as a WhatsApp team inbox in 2020, Wati has evolved into a full revenue orchestration system that goes beyond a single platform. We empower businesses that sell, support, and grow through conversations by observing customer intent in real-time, deciding the next best revenue action, and executing it seamlessly across marketing, sales, and support—all within WhatsApp and connected messaging channels.

Our Platform & AI Capabilities

Wati is designed for scalability and intelligence. Our AI-native platform simplifies complex customer communication operations through a unified inbox, a robust multi-channel messaging infrastructure, and no-code automation. At the heart of our solution is Astra, our intelligent AI layer, which helps you create AI Agents for all customer interactions and all your messaging platforms. By integrating AI agents into the ecosystem, we enable businesses of all sizes to deliver measurable ROI and build deeper customer relationships.

Our Backing & Partnerships

Trusted by over 16,000 customers across 190+ countries, Wati is proudly backed by world-class investors including Tiger Global, Sequoia Capital, DST Global, and Shopify. As a Premium-tier Partner of Meta and Google, we maintain the highest standards of platform excellence and integration.

About The Role

Wati is growing rapidly and we are looking to hire a Senior Product Manager to help scale our product offerings and work with our product and engineering teams to develop and execute our shared product vision. We are looking for extremely entrepreneurial PMs who value moving quickly.

If you have demonstrated experience building APIs & MCPs, understand developer communities, have empathy for both consumers and businesses and want to unlock the potential for messaging to serve millions of customers, we would be excited to hear from you.

This will be an opportunity for you to build experiences that thousands of small businesses use on a daily basis, and to be a key part of this high growth journey.

What you'll do:

  • Own the product strategy and roadmap for building native integrations, strong APIs and an Agent friendly platform
  • Identify high-impact integration and ecosystem opportunities by analyzing developer needs, Agent behaviours, partner platforms, and competitive landscapes
  • Work closely with engineering to define APIs, SDKs, auth, and extensibility primitives that scale and are easy to adopt
  • Build a product-led partnerships strategy that turns integrations into a repeatable demand and revenue channel
  • Lead 0→1 and early-scale experiments for new integrations, marketplaces and communities; measuring adoption, activation, and revenue impact
  • Collaborate with sales, partnership and marketing teams to launch, position, and grow integrations and drive adoption amongst developer communities
  • Synthesize learnings and present clear recommendations to leadership

Requirements

  • Experience as a Senior Product Manager at a scale or growth-stage company, ideally on developer, platform, or ecosystem products
  • Strong technical product judgment; comfortable working with AI platforms, APIs, MCPs, integrations, LLM tooling, and developer and agentic workflows
  • Track record of launching new platforms and iterating based on real usage and data
  • Ability to operate with ambiguity while building systems that scale
  • Data-driven mindset with clear communication and stakeholder management skills

Nice to have:

  • Experience at a startup or high-growth scaleup
  • Coding or SQL experience — you don't need to ship code, but you can read it and get your own answers from data
  • Familiarity with the messaging, CPaaS, or WhatsApp ecosystem
  • Bachelor's in Computer Science or a related technical field

title: Senior Product Manager - AI Platform
description: About the RoleWe are looking for a Senior Product Manager for our AI Platform to drive the execution and delivery of Aurigo's proprietary AI foundation model, agent framework, and the AI platform layer that powers our products. This is a hands-on product role that operates at the intersection of AI engineering, enterprise software, and capital program workflows. You will partner closely with engineering, data science, and design teams to define, build, and ship AI capabilities that are safe, measurable, and impactful in enterprise environments. Unlike the Director role which is focused on strategy, vision, and stakeholder leadership, this role is about deep execution. You will own specific product areas end to end, write detailed requirements, drive sprint-level delivery, and ensure that AI products meet well-defined quality and safety standards before reaching customers. You will also engage with customers and internal product teams to ground your decisions in real-world use cases.Roles and ResponsibilitiesOwn and execute the product roadmap for assigned areas of the AI platform, including the ingestion and context layer, orchestration layer, agent framework components, and the Copilot experience across all product lines.Write detailed product requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria for AI features, and drive sprint planning, backlog grooming, and delivery tracking in close partnership with engineering and machine learning teams.Define and maintain the evaluation framework for assigned AI features including offline evals, benchmark metrics, regression tests, and production monitoring. No agent or model capability ships without defined success criteria.Own the responsible AI execution process at the feature level, including guardrail testing, safety checklists, bias review, and auditability verification before any AI capability reaches customers.Serve as the internal AI platform expert for Senior Product Managers across all product lines, providing guidance on how to correctly integrate, specify, and evaluate AI capabilities within their respective workflows.Contribute to the model management and MCP server roadmap by gathering data on provider performance, cost, and quality, and by identifying integration opportunities and validating tool specifications.Engage with enterprise customers to gather feedback on AI feature performance, understand adoption patterns, and translate insights into roadmap decisions.Monitor the competitive landscape for relevant AI product developments, agent frameworks, and enterprise AI tooling, and bring insights into prioritization discussions.Soft SkillsTechnically credible with engineering and data science teams. Can engage substantively on prompt design, evaluation tradeoffs, RAG configurations, and agent behavior without needing to write code.Clear and precise communicator. Able to write requirements, specs, and documentation that engineering teams can act on without repeated clarification.Customer empathy. Listens carefully to enterprise customer feedback and translates nuanced qualitative input into actionable product decisions.High ownership mindset. Takes accountability for feature quality, safety, and customer outcomes, not just delivery of scope.Structured problem-solver. Breaks ambiguous AI product challenges into well-defined hypotheses, experiments, and evaluation plans.Stays current with fast-moving developments in foundation models, agentic architectures, and enterprise AI deployment patterns.Hard SkillsStrong understanding of the AI product development lifecycle including data pipelines, prompt engineering, RAG architectures, fine-tuning, and agentic system design.Experience designing and running AI evaluation frameworks including offline evals, human evaluation pipelines, and production monitoring for AI features.Familiarity with responsible AI principles including human-in-the-loop design, fairness considerations, auditability, and guardrail implementation in enterprise settings.Working knowledge of model context protocol or equivalent tool-use and integration frameworks for agentic systems.Ability to define and track AI-specific product metrics including task completion rates, hallucination rates, model latency, cost per inference, and user satisfaction signals.Technical SkillsFamiliarity with major foundation model providers and the practical tradeoffs among them in terms of capability, cost, latency, context window, and data privacy.Working knowledge of vector databases, semantic search, and embedding-based retrieval systems relevant to RAG product design.Familiarity with AI evaluation tooling such as LLM eval libraries, RAGAS, or equivalent frameworks for measuring AI system performance.Understanding of AI orchestration patterns including ReAct loops, multi-agent coordination, and durable workflow execution for long-running agent tasks.Proficiency with standard product management tools alongside AI-specific development and observability platforms.Educational QualificationsBachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or a related technical field. Advanced degree in a relevant discipline is an advantage.Prior Experience7 to 10 years of experience in product management, with at least 2 to 3 years owning AI or machine learning product features in a B2B SaaS or enterprise software environment.Demonstrated experience shipping AI features to production in enterprise contexts, including agents, copilots, predictive models, or recommendation systems.Hands-on experience defining evaluation criteria and running evals for AI features, including benchmark design, human evaluation coordination, and production quality tracking.Experience working directly with data science and machine learning engineering teams on model prototyping, prompt iteration, or deployment workflows.Background in infrastructure, construction, capital program management, or other complex enterprise domains is a strong advantage.About AurigoAurigo provides AI-native platforms that help capital owners connect planning, construction, and operations in a single environment, improving decision-making and execution. Trusted by over 300 organizations across federal, state, and local government, manufacturing, data centers, energy and utilities, and life sciences, we manage more than $450 billion in capital programs across 40,000+ projects in North America. Built on 20+ years of domain expertise, Aurigo has received multiple industry awards and has been certified as a Great Place to Work for three consecutive years.At Aurigo, we go beyond building technology—we shape the future. If you're excited to join a fast-growing company and collaborate with some of the brightest minds in the industry to solve real-world challenges, let's connect.
descriptionHtml:
About the Role

We are looking for a Senior Product Manager for our AI Platform to drive the execution and delivery of Aurigo's proprietary AI foundation model, agent framework, and the AI platform layer that powers our products. This is a hands-on product role that operates at the intersection of AI engineering, enterprise software, and capital program workflows. You will partner closely with engineering, data science, and design teams to define, build, and ship AI capabilities that are safe, measurable, and impactful in enterprise environments. Unlike the Director role which is focused on strategy, vision, and stakeholder leadership, this role is about deep execution. You will own specific product areas end to end, write detailed requirements, drive sprint-level delivery, and ensure that AI products meet well-defined quality and safety standards before reaching customers. You will also engage with customers and internal product teams to ground your decisions in real-world use cases.


Roles and Responsibilities

  • Own and execute the product roadmap for assigned areas of the AI platform, including the ingestion and context layer, orchestration layer, agent framework components, and the Copilot experience across all product lines.
  • Write detailed product requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria for AI features, and drive sprint planning, backlog grooming, and delivery tracking in close partnership with engineering and machine learning teams.
  • Define and maintain the evaluation framework for assigned AI features including offline evals, benchmark metrics, regression tests, and production monitoring. No agent or model capability ships without defined success criteria.
  • Own the responsible AI execution process at the feature level, including guardrail testing, safety checklists, bias review, and auditability verification before any AI capability reaches customers.
  • Serve as the internal AI platform expert for Senior Product Managers across all product lines, providing guidance on how to correctly integrate, specify, and evaluate AI capabilities within their respective workflows.
  • Contribute to the model management and MCP server roadmap by gathering data on provider performance, cost, and quality, and by identifying integration opportunities and validating tool specifications.
  • Engage with enterprise customers to gather feedback on AI feature performance, understand adoption patterns, and translate insights into roadmap decisions.
  • Monitor the competitive landscape for relevant AI product developments, agent frameworks, and enterprise AI tooling, and bring insights into prioritization discussions.


Soft Skills

  • Technically credible with engineering and data science teams. Can engage substantively on prompt design, evaluation tradeoffs, RAG configurations, and agent behavior without needing to write code.
  • Clear and precise communicator. Able to write requirements, specs, and documentation that engineering teams can act on without repeated clarification.
  • Customer empathy. Listens carefully to enterprise customer feedback and translates nuanced qualitative input into actionable product decisions.
  • High ownership mindset. Takes accountability for feature quality, safety, and customer outcomes, not just delivery of scope.
  • Structured problem-solver. Breaks ambiguous AI product challenges into well-defined hypotheses, experiments, and evaluation plans.
  • Stays current with fast-moving developments in foundation models, agentic architectures, and enterprise AI deployment patterns.


Hard Skills

  • Strong understanding of the AI product development lifecycle including data pipelines, prompt engineering, RAG architectures, fine-tuning, and agentic system design.
  • Experience designing and running AI evaluation frameworks including offline evals, human evaluation pipelines, and production monitoring for AI features.
  • Familiarity with responsible AI principles including human-in-the-loop design, fairness considerations, auditability, and guardrail implementation in enterprise settings.
  • Working knowledge of model context protocol or equivalent tool-use and integration frameworks for agentic systems.
  • Ability to define and track AI-specific product metrics including task completion rates, hallucination rates, model latency, cost per inference, and user satisfaction signals.


Technical Skills

  • Familiarity with major foundation model providers and the practical tradeoffs among them in terms of capability, cost, latency, context window, and data privacy.
  • Working knowledge of vector databases, semantic search, and embedding-based retrieval systems relevant to RAG product design.
  • Familiarity with AI evaluation tooling such as LLM eval libraries, RAGAS, or equivalent frameworks for measuring AI system performance.
  • Understanding of AI orchestration patterns including ReAct loops, multi-agent coordination, and durable workflow execution for long-running agent tasks.
  • Proficiency with standard product management tools alongside AI-specific development and observability platforms.


Educational Qualifications

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or a related technical field. Advanced degree in a relevant discipline is an advantage.


Prior Experience

  • 7 to 10 years of experience in product management, with at least 2 to 3 years owning AI or machine learning product features in a B2B SaaS or enterprise software environment.
  • Demonstrated experience shipping AI features to production in enterprise contexts, including agents, copilots, predictive models, or recommendation systems.
  • Hands-on experience defining evaluation criteria and running evals for AI features, including benchmark design, human evaluation coordination, and production quality tracking.
  • Experience working directly with data science and machine learning engineering teams on model prototyping, prompt iteration, or deployment workflows.
  • Background in infrastructure, construction, capital program management, or other complex enterprise domains is a strong advantage.


About Aurigo

Aurigo provides AI-native platforms that help capital owners connect planning, construction, and operations in a single environment, improving decision-making and execution. Trusted by over 300 organizations across federal, state, and local government, manufacturing, data centers, energy and utilities, and life sciences, we manage more than $450 billion in capital programs across 40,000+ projects in North America. Built on 20+ years of domain expertise, Aurigo has received multiple industry awards and has been certified as a Great Place to Work for three consecutive years.


At Aurigo, we go beyond building technology—we shape the future. If you're excited to join a fast-growing company and collaborate with some of the brightest minds in the industry to solve real-world challenges, let's connect.

descriptionHtml:
Principal Product Manager - Media

Sabre’s media technology platform powers the marketing campaigns that travel suppliers purchase across Sabre’s proprietary channels. With our industry‑leading Air, Lodging, Ground, and Sea businesses, along with a strong partner ecosystem, we see a significant opportunity to scale the media business over the next two years and expand our channel reach.

The Media Product team works closely with customers, commercial teams, technology partners, and internal product and engineering teams. We emphasize collaboration, data‑driven decision making, and rapid learning to solve real business problems. The successful candidate will balance strategic thinking with hands‑on execution, communicate complex concepts clearly, operate with high autonomy, and influence outcomes across teams and senior stakeholders.

Responsibilities

  • Own and evolve the product vision and roadmap to support Sabre’s strategic, commercial, and growth goals for the media technology platform
  • Own the end‑to‑end media product lifecycle, including inventory strategy, monetization, measurement, and optimization of customer outcomes
  • Partner with Sabre’s Media Commercial team to align product capabilities, go‑to‑market readiness, and customer demand
  • Translate product vision into clear requirements and user stories to enable strong engineering collaboration and value delivery
  • Collaborate with Product teams across Agent, Airline, and Corporate channels to enable media display, attribution, and conversion tracking
  • Support Sales and Account leaders in customer engagements by developing product narratives, collateral, and demos, while incorporating customer feedback into the roadmap
  • Define, track, and communicate customer and commercial value through dashboards, insights, and customer‑facing reporting

Requirements

  • Proven experience in Product Management, product development, and/or product delivery
  • Experience with digital media, advertising, sponsored content, or monetization platforms is strongly preferred
  • Strong presentation and communication skills, with the ability to simplify complex concepts for diverse audiences
  • Demonstrated success in stakeholder management, including influencing senior leadership and cross‑functional teams
  • Experience delivering complex products in ambiguous environments with multiple dependencies
  • Strong track record of data‑driven decision making, including defining success metrics and evaluating trade‑offs
  • Ability to build and sustain trusted relationships with internal teams, customers, and external partners
  • Passion for media, advertising technology, and the platforms that power them
