descriptionHtml:
The CAS (Customer Agent Solutions) Digital Service Operations team manages the E2E digital service operations for all digital channels. The team collaborates with multiple cross functional teams and bridges the gap between strategic goals and daily execution by day-to-day management of performance monitoring, defect management, optimization testing, infra and capabilities functions to ensure operations delivers on its daily/weekly/monthly handling objectives. Works as liaison between product and technology operations to reach the forecasted KPI targets for digital service customer experiences.

This role operates at the intersection of digital operations, customer experience, and AI‑powered transformation. You will help drive the integration of intelligent automation, predictive analytics, and GenAI capabilities into digital service channels to improve customer experiences, enhance agent efficiency, and optimize operational performance.

As a Customer Experience Digital Operations Manager, you will:

  • Oversee end-to-end digital service operations across customer and agent journeys, partnering with Product, Technology, and Architecture teams to ensure smooth delivery of features, fixes, and enhancements
  • Define and monitor KPIs such as experience scores, CSAT, FCR, and system uptime to track digital performance across various digital channels
  • Drive real-time customer and agent experience tracking, identify friction points, and lead UX improvement initiatives backed by data analysis and user feedback
  • Manage critical defects and high-priority escalations by coordinating with stakeholder teams to ensure rapid and accurate resolution
  • Build and maintain real-time dashboards to surface trends, generate insights, and inform leadership decisions; leverage tools such as Qualtrics, Mixpanel, and Fullstory etc
  • Use customer and partner research to strengthen analytical capabilities, identify market trends, and recommend customer experience enhancements
  • Partner with data science, analytics, and engineering teams to embed AI-driven insights into digital operations, enabling proactive issue detection and resolution
  • Apply AI-based predictive models to forecast demand, detect patterns, and inform operational and resource planning
  • Evaluate and operationalize AI copilots, GenAI assistants, and automation tools to streamline agent workflows and improve customer self-service
  • Promote responsible AI through governance, transparency, bias monitoring, explainability, and data privacy practices
  • Lead GenAI-powered experiments that include personalized content, conversational experiences, and journey-level optimizations
  • Support AI-driven journey analytics using NLP, clustering, sentiment analysis, and behavioral modeling to improve customer understanding

Key Responsibilities

  • Identify and scope opportunities to utilize AI, machine learning, and automation to optimize digital experience operations and agent support processes
  • Collaborate with product owners to build AI‑informed business cases, including ROI modeling for predictive experiences, intelligent routing, and automated troubleshooting
  • Manage AI‑enabled dashboards and monitoring systems that surface real‑time anomalies, experience dips, and emerging performance trends
  • Partner with CX, analytics, and engineering teams to run A/B tests leveraging AI‑generated variants, measuring uplift and customer impact
  • Translate customer and agent insights using AI‑powered analytics (e.g., text/sentiment analysis, pattern detection) into actionable recommendations for journey improvements
  • Apply GenAI capabilities to improve team operations, e.g., automated insights summaries, triaging, root cause analysis drafting, and workflow documentation

Experience & Education Requirements:

  • Overall experience >8 years, 5+ years' experience required with extensive relevant customer understanding/user research/consulting experience, packaging and delivering insights to influence change. 6+ years of combined experience required in analytics, performance reporting, and/or process improvement
  • Advanced project and process management experience. Agile preferred
  • Bachelor's degree preferred in Technology, Mathematics, Statistics, Business, or related field
  • Master's degree preferred in Management, Analytics, Artificial Intelligence
  • Experience working with AI/ML‑driven platforms or analytics tools (e.g., customer behavioral modeling, NLP pipelines, predictive analytics)
  • Background or coursework in AI, machine learning, data science, or human‑centered AI preferred
  • Demonstrated ability to translate technical AI concepts into business language for non‑technical stakeholders
  • Availability to work in PST time zone

Requirements

Other Critical Skills

  • Familiarity with GenAI tools, conversational AI platforms, and AI‑assisted productivity solutions
  • Ability to interpret outputs from models using techniques such as anomaly detection, clustering, and predictive scoring
  • Strong understanding of AI ethics, governance, and responsible AI frameworks
  • Comfortable working in environments where AI‑driven decision automation informs prioritization and operational strategies
  • Possesses strong technical aptitude. Intermediate knowledge in using analytic tools such as Tableau and Microsoft Excel. Proficient in Microsoft Office including MS Word, Excel, Outlook, PowerPoint
  • Strong verbal communication and listening skills. Strong business acumen, with effective written and verbal communication skills
  • Ability to communicate, influence, and deliver with cross-functional teams and enterprise stakeholders. Ability to manage multiple projects with tight deadlines effectively with cross functional teams

Software / Tool Skills

  • Experience with AI/ML or data intelligence platforms (e.g., Azure ML, AWS SageMaker, Google Vertex AI—basic exposure acceptable)
  • Hands‑on familiarity with GenAI copilots, prompt engineering concepts, or LLM‑based experience analysis tools
  • Experience interpreting insights from NLP, AI‑powered text analytics, or conversational AI systems
  • Hands on experience with user Feedback/Data analysis tools - Qualtrics, Fullstory, Mixpanel etc
  • Good proficiency or practical experience of A/B Testing tools
  • Agile tools such as Jira, Rally etc
  • Understanding of Contact center and CMS tools
  • Excel - Intermediate/Advanced. Proficiency in Microsoft 365
  • Power BI (Highly Preferred)

Benefits

Competitive compensation and benefits package:

  • Competitive salary and performance-based bonuses
  • Comprehensive benefits package
  • Career development and training opportunities
  • Flexible work arrangements (remote and/or office-based)
  • Dynamic and inclusive work culture within a globally renowned group
  • Private Health Insurance
  • Pension Plan
  • Paid Time Off
  • Training & Development

Note: Benefits differ based on employee level.

About Capgemini

Capgemini is a global leader in partnering with companies to transform and manage their business by harnessing the power of technology. The Group is guided everyday by its purpose of unleashing human energy through technology for an inclusive and sustainable future. It is a responsible and diverse organization of over 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong 55-year heritage and deep industry expertise, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to address the entire breadth of their business needs, from strategy and design to operations, fueled by the fast evolving and innovative world of cloud, data, AI, connectivity, software, digital engineering and platforms. The Group €22.5 billion in revenues in 2023.

https://www.capgemini.com/us-en/about-us/who-we-are/

title: Senior Product Manager - Subscriptions Scaling
description: Teamwork makes the stream work. Roku is changing how the world watches TVRoku is the #1 TV streaming platform in the U.S., Canada, and Mexico, and we've set our sights on powering every television in the world. Roku pioneered streaming to the TV. Our mission is to be the TV streaming platform that connects the entire TV ecosystem. We connect consumers to the content they love, enable content publishers to build and monetize large audiences, and provide advertisers unique capabilities to engage consumers.From your first day at Roku, you'll make a valuable - and valued - contribution. We're a fast-growing public company where no one is a bystander. We offer you the opportunity to delight millions of TV streamers around the world while gaining meaningful experience across a variety of disciplines.  About the Team The Content Platform & Intelligence team builds the pipelines, tooling, and intelligence that power Roku’s global Sports, Live, and VOD experiences. We ingest and enrich partner catalogs at scale, ensure rights-accurate availability, and feed core platform experiences like Search, Browse, and Recommendations. We obsess over metadata quality, reliability, and performance so viewers can seamlessly discover and watch what they love.About the Role We’re seeking a Senior Product Manager to scale how Roku onboards and operates Premium Subscription partners. You will own the product strategy and execution for onboarding VOD, Live, and Sports content at scale; keeping content rights, volumes, and performance at the center. You’ll partner closely with Subscriptions, Metadata Platform, Sports & Live product teams, Content Operations, Partnerships, and Engineering to deliver high-quality integrations that power monetisation, discovery, and delightful viewer experiences.What You’ll DoOwn the roadmap for onboarding new Premium Subscription partners covering VOD, Live, and Sports. Collaborate with metadata providers to enhance Live & Sports coverage: schedules, fixtures, teams/players, scores, artwork, league hierarchies. Partner with the Content Platform team to ingest, normalise, and store content intelligence that drives Search and Recommendations. Model regional rights, windows, blackout rules, entitlements, and service-level policies to ensure the right content shows up for the right users. Build internal tools and workflows that minimise manual merchandising and ops, especially for new markets and complex sports/live schedules. We’re Excited If You Have7+ years of Product Management experience in platform/backend or content systems; streaming/media experience strongly preferred. Proven track record building scalable ingestion/onboarding platforms, catalog systems, or developer ecosystems. Experience with VOD/Live/Sports pipelines, content rights and availability modelling, and internationalisation. Experience partnering with ML/AI teams on metadata quality, enrichment, ranking, or recommendations; comfortable with experimentation at scale.    Our Hybrid Work ApproachRoku fosters an inclusive and collaborative environment where teams work in the office Monday through Thursday. Fridays are flexible for remote work except for employees whose roles are required to be in the office five days a week or employees who are in offices with a five day in office policy. BenefitsRoku is committed to offering a diverse range of benefits as part of our compensation package to support our employees and their families. Our comprehensive benefits include global access to mental health and financial wellness support and resources. Local benefits include statutory and voluntary benefits which may include healthcare (medical, dental, and vision), life, accident, disability, commuter, and retirement options (401(k)/pension). Employees are supported in taking time off, in accordance with local leave policies and other personal needs to support their evolving work and life needs. It's important to note that not every benefit is available in all locations or for every role. For details specific to your location, please consult with your recruiter. AccommodationsRoku welcomes applicants of all backgrounds and provides reasonable accommodations and adjustments in accordance with applicable law. If you require reasonable accommodation at any point in the hiring process, please direct your inquiries to EmployeeRelations@Roku.com. The Roku CultureRoku is a great place for people who want to work in a fast-paced environment where everyone is focused on the company's success rather than their own. We try to surround ourselves with people who are great at their jobs, who are easy to work with, and who keep their egos in check. We appreciate a sense of humor. We believe a fewer number of very talented folks can do more for less cost than a larger number of less talented teams. We're independent thinkers with big ideas who act boldly, move fast and accomplish extraordinary things through collaboration and trust. In short, at Roku you'll be part of a company that's changing how the world watches TV. We have a unique culture that we are proud of. We think of ourselves primarily as problem-solvers, which itself is a two-part idea. We come up with the solution, but the solution isn't real until it is built and delivered to the customer. That penchant for action gives us a pragmatic approach to innovation, one that has served us well since 2002. To learn more about Roku, our global footprint, and how we've grown, visit https://www.weareroku.com/factsheet.By providing your information, you acknowledge that you want Roku to contact you about job roles, that you have read Roku's Applicant Privacy Notice, and understand that Roku will use your information as described in that notice. If you do not wish to receive any communications from Roku regarding this role or similar roles in the future, you may unsubscribe at any time by emailing WorkforcePrivacy@Roku.com.
descriptionHtml:
Teamwork makes the stream work.

 

Roku is changing how the world watches TV

Roku is the #1 TV streaming platform in the U.S., Canada, and Mexico, and we've set our sights on powering every television in the world. Roku pioneered streaming to the TV. Our mission is to be the TV streaming platform that connects the entire TV ecosystem. We connect consumers to the content they love, enable content publishers to build and monetize large audiences, and provide advertisers unique capabilities to engage consumers.

From your first day at Roku, you'll make a valuable - and valued - contribution. We're a fast-growing public company where no one is a bystander. We offer you the opportunity to delight millions of TV streamers around the world while gaining meaningful experience across a variety of disciplines.

 

About the Team 

The Content Platform & Intelligence team builds the pipelines, tooling, and intelligence that power Roku’s global Sports, Live, and VOD experiences. We ingest and enrich partner catalogs at scale, ensure rights-accurate availability, and feed core platform experiences like Search, Browse, and Recommendations. We obsess over metadata quality, reliability, and performance so viewers can seamlessly discover and watch what they love.

About the Role 

We’re seeking a Senior Product Manager to scale how Roku onboards and operates Premium Subscription partners. You will own the product strategy and execution for onboarding VOD, Live, and Sports content at scale; keeping content rights, volumes, and performance at the center. You’ll partner closely with Subscriptions, Metadata Platform, Sports & Live product teams, Content Operations, Partnerships, and Engineering to deliver high-quality integrations that power monetisation, discovery, and delightful viewer experiences.

What You’ll Do

  • Own the roadmap for onboarding new Premium Subscription partners covering VOD, Live, and Sports.
  • Collaborate with metadata providers to enhance Live & Sports coverage: schedules, fixtures, teams/players, scores, artwork, league hierarchies.
  • Partner with the Content Platform team to ingest, normalise, and store content intelligence that drives Search and Recommendations.
  • Model regional rights, windows, blackout rules, entitlements, and service-level policies to ensure the right content shows up for the right users.
  • Build internal tools and workflows that minimise manual merchandising and ops, especially for new markets and complex sports/live schedules.

We’re Excited If You Have

  • 7+ years of Product Management experience in platform/backend or content systems; streaming/media experience strongly preferred.
  • Proven track record building scalable ingestion/onboarding platforms, catalog systems, or developer ecosystems.
  • Experience with VOD/Live/Sports pipelines, content rights and availability modelling, and internationalisation.
  • Experience partnering with ML/AI teams on metadata quality, enrichment, ranking, or recommendations; comfortable with experimentation at scale.

 

 

Our Hybrid Work Approach

Roku fosters an inclusive and collaborative environment where teams work in the office Monday through Thursday. Fridays are flexible for remote work except for employees whose roles are required to be in the office five days a week or employees who are in offices with a five day in office policy.

 

Benefits

Roku is committed to offering a diverse range of benefits as part of our compensation package to support our employees and their families. Our comprehensive benefits include global access to mental health and financial wellness support and resources. Local benefits include statutory and voluntary benefits which may include healthcare (medical, dental, and vision), life, accident, disability, commuter, and retirement options (401(k)/pension). Employees are supported in taking time off, in accordance with local leave policies and other personal needs to support their evolving work and life needs. It's important to note that not every benefit is available in all locations or for every role. For details specific to your location, please consult with your recruiter.

 

Accommodations

Roku welcomes applicants of all backgrounds and provides reasonable accommodations and adjustments in accordance with applicable law. If you require reasonable accommodation at any point in the hiring process, please direct your inquiries to EmployeeRelations@Roku.com.

 

The Roku Culture

Roku is a great place for people who want to work in a fast-paced environment where everyone is focused on the company's success rather than their own. We try to surround ourselves with people who are great at their jobs, who are easy to work with, and who keep their egos in check. We appreciate a sense of humor. We believe a fewer number of very talented folks can do more for less cost than a larger number of less talented teams. We're independent thinkers with big ideas who act boldly, move fast and accomplish extraordinary things through collaboration and trust. In short, at Roku you'll be part of a company that's changing how the world watches TV. 

We have a unique culture that we are proud of. We think of ourselves primarily as problem-solvers, which itself is a two-part idea. We come up with the solution, but the solution isn't real until it is built and delivered to the customer. That penchant for action gives us a pragmatic approach to innovation, one that has served us well since 2002. 

To learn more about Roku, our global footprint, and how we've grown, visit https://www.weareroku.com/factsheet.

By providing your information, you acknowledge that you want Roku to contact you about job roles, that you have read Roku's Applicant Privacy Notice, and understand that Roku will use your information as described in that notice. If you do not wish to receive any communications from Roku regarding this role or similar roles in the future, you may unsubscribe at any time by emailing WorkforcePrivacy@Roku.com.

descriptionHtml:
Company Description

Honda Motor Co., Ltd., Japan is establishing a new Digital Innovation entity in India to accelerate growth through customer intelligence, digital platforms, connected experiences, and next-generation mobility solutions.


Headquartered in Bengaluru, this organization will combine Honda’s global scale with India’s technology ecosystem to build capabilities that directly influence product strategy, customer growth, and new business creation across India and other high-growth markets.


Role Description

We are looking for a Senior Product Manager – Digital Platforms to lead the strategy and execution of customer-facing digital products across mobile apps, web platforms, and future connected services.


You will own the roadmap and evolution of products that improve ownership experience, service engagement, customer retention, and lifecycle value. This role requires someone who can translate real customer needs and Honda business operations into practical, high-impact digital solutions. You will work at the intersection of product, customer experience, operations, and business growth.


Key Responsibilities

  • Own end-to-end product vision for mobile apps, web platforms, and related digital products
  • Define product roadmap aligned with Honda motorcycle and automobile business priorities
  • Translate customer pain points, operational realities, and business needs into product requirements and user stories
  • Drive feature development across the customer lifecycle: purchase → onboarding → usage → service → loyalty
  • Prioritize backlog and work closely with engineering teams for timely delivery
  • Improve customer engagement, retention, service usage, and digital adoption metrics
  • Partner with Sales, Service, Marketing, UX, and Analytics teams to deliver high-value features
  • Validate new concepts through pilots, field feedback, and user testing
  • Monitor product KPIs and continuously optimize journeys and platform performance
  • Act as the voice of business operations and customers in product decisions


Qualifications

Required

  • 8+ years of experience in Program Management, Project Management, Innovation, Strategy Execution, or related roles
  • Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Business or a relevant field
  • Proven experience managing complex cross-functional programs
  • Experience working with startups, incubators, accelerators, or external partners
  • Strong planning, prioritization, and stakeholder management skills
  • Ability to drive execution in fast-moving and ambiguous environments
  • Strong communication and presentation skills


Preferred

  • Prior experience in automotive, mobility, retail, fintech, or consumer digital platforms
  • Exposure to customer lifecycle products, CRM, loyalty, or service platforms
  • Experience with Agile / Scrum product delivery models
  • Field experience in sales, service, dealer network, or customer operations is highly valued
  • Familiarity with app analytics and experimentation tools


Why join

  • Own digital products with direct customer and business impact
  • Build platforms serving millions of users
  • Work across mobility, customer experience, and growth initiatives
  • Strong long-term career growth potential

title: Senior Product Manager
description: Alation is pioneering the next era of data intelligence — powered by AI agents and trusted data. Organizations around the world rely on Alation to drive self-service analytics, cloud transformation, data governance, and AI innovation. Our technology helps enterprises connect people and data to make faster, smarter, and more confident decisions. With more than $340M in funding – valued at over $1.7 billion and more than 650 customers, including 40% of the Fortune 100.As data becomes the foundation of every business, Alation is leading the way in helping organizations unlock their full potential. By bringing intelligence, automation, and trust to every interaction, we empower customers to scale data-driven innovation with confidence and speed.Joining Alation means being part of a winning team shaping the future of AI-powered data intelligence. We move fast, think big, and deliver results together.Job DescriptionAlation’s vision is to deliver the most trusted and actionable data intelligence platform. The lineage graph is one of the most critical assets in pursuit of that vision. It must be accurate, performant, stable, and deeply interoperable—powering both customer-facing lineage experiences and an entire ecosystem of metadata-driven applications, including impact analysis, root cause diagnosis, curation propagation, and automation workflows.The lineage graph is a foundational capability within Alation’s Data Intelligence Platform. It underpins trust, enables governance at scale, and powers a growing set of customer-facing and internal applications—from impact analysis to curation automation.We are looking for a Senior Product Manager to own this lineage platform end to end. This role is for a product leader who is comfortable operating at the intersection of platform infrastructure, customer outcomes, and long-term technical strategy—and who wants to raise the standard for product thinking and execution across the organization.What You'll Be DoingOwn the vision, strategy, and delivery of Alation’s lineage graph as a core platform capability. Ensure the lineage graph is stable, trustworthy, and consumable across UI, APIs, and external systems. Partner with customers and other squads to directly or indirectly enable lineage-powered experiences and applications across agentic governance and analytics workflows. Partner deeply with engineering to evolve scalable graph infrastructure and set quality standards. Raise the bar for product clarity, execution quality, and cross-team alignment.You Should Have5–10+ years of product experience, ideally building platform, infrastructure, or deeply technical data systems. Demonstrated ability to own complex graphs, metadata systems, data pipelines, or large-scale distributed systems. Strength in systems thinking and architecture-level problem solving. Ability to navigate ambiguity, create alignment, and distill complex technical domains into crisp decision frameworks. Exceptional communication skills; ability to influence across engineering, leadership, and customers. Experience working with enterprise data ecosystems (data lakes, warehouses, ETL/ELT, BI, orchestration tools) is strongly preferred. A high standard for execution, quality, and craft—both in the product and in how the org operates.Alation, Inc. is an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regards to that individual’s race, color, religion or creed, national origin or ancestry, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, gender identity, age, physical or mental disability, veteran status, genetic information, ethnicity, citizenship, or any other characteristic protected by law. The Company will strive to provide reasonable accommodations to permit qualified applicants who have a need for an accommodation to participate in the hiring process (e.g., accommodations for a job interview) if so requested. This company participates in E-Verify. Click on any of the links below to view or print the full poster.  E-Verify and Right to Work.
descriptionHtml:
Alation is pioneering the next era of data intelligence — powered by AI agents and trusted data. Organizations around the world rely on Alation to drive self-service analytics, cloud transformation, data governance, and AI innovation. Our technology helps enterprises connect people and data to make faster, smarter, and more confident decisions. With more than $340M in funding – valued at over $1.7 billion and more than 650 customers, including 40% of the Fortune 100.

As data becomes the foundation of every business, Alation is leading the way in helping organizations unlock their full potential. By bringing intelligence, automation, and trust to every interaction, we empower customers to scale data-driven innovation with confidence and speed.

Joining Alation means being part of a winning team shaping the future of AI-powered data intelligence. We move fast, think big, and deliver results together.

Job Description

Alation’s vision is to deliver the most trusted and actionable data intelligence platform. The lineage graph is one of the most critical assets in pursuit of that vision. It must be accurate, performant, stable, and deeply interoperable—powering both customer-facing lineage experiences and an entire ecosystem of metadata-driven applications, including impact analysis, root cause diagnosis, curation propagation, and automation workflows.

The lineage graph is a foundational capability within Alation’s Data Intelligence Platform. It underpins trust, enables governance at scale, and powers a growing set of customer-facing and internal applications—from impact analysis to curation automation.

We are looking for a Senior Product Manager to own this lineage platform end to end. This role is for a product leader who is comfortable operating at the intersection of platform infrastructure, customer outcomes, and long-term technical strategy—and who wants to raise the standard for product thinking and execution across the organization.

What You'll Be Doing

  • Own the vision, strategy, and delivery of Alation’s lineage graph as a core platform capability.
  • Ensure the lineage graph is stable, trustworthy, and consumable across UI, APIs, and external systems.
  • Partner with customers and other squads to directly or indirectly enable lineage-powered experiences and applications across agentic governance and analytics workflows.
  • Partner deeply with engineering to evolve scalable graph infrastructure and set quality standards.
  • Raise the bar for product clarity, execution quality, and cross-team alignment.

You Should Have

  • 5–10+ years of product experience, ideally building platform, infrastructure, or deeply technical data systems.
  • Demonstrated ability to own complex graphs, metadata systems, data pipelines, or large-scale distributed systems.
  • Strength in systems thinking and architecture-level problem solving.
  • Ability to navigate ambiguity, create alignment, and distill complex technical domains into crisp decision frameworks.
  • Exceptional communication skills; ability to influence across engineering, leadership, and customers.
  • Experience working with enterprise data ecosystems (data lakes, warehouses, ETL/ELT, BI, orchestration tools) is strongly preferred.
  • A high standard for execution, quality, and craft—both in the product and in how the org operates.

Alation, Inc. is an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regards to that individual’s race, color, religion or creed, national origin or ancestry, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, gender identity, age, physical or mental disability, veteran status, genetic information, ethnicity, citizenship, or any other characteristic protected by law.

The Company will strive to provide reasonable accommodations to permit qualified applicants who have a need for an accommodation to participate in the hiring process (e.g., accommodations for a job interview) if so requested.

This company participates in E-Verify. Click on any of the links below to view or print the full poster. E-Verify and Right to Work.

title: Senior Product Manager
description: Senior Product Manager - MediaSabre’s media technology platform powers the marketing campaigns that travel suppliers purchase across Sabre’s proprietary channels. With our industry‑leading Air, Lodging, Ground, and Sea businesses, along with a growing partner ecosystem, Sabre continues to invest in expanding its media offerings and reach.The Media Product team works closely with customers, commercial teams, and engineering partners to deliver impactful, measurable media solutions. descriptionHtml:
Senior Product Manager - Media

Sabre’s media technology platform powers the marketing campaigns that travel suppliers purchase across Sabre’s proprietary channels. With our industry‑leading Air, Lodging, Ground, and Sea businesses, along with a growing partner ecosystem, Sabre continues to invest in expanding its media offerings and reach.

The Media Product team works closely with customers, commercial teams, and engineering partners to deliver impactful, measurable media solutions. This role is ideal for a product manager who enjoys working in a fast‑moving environment, translating business needs into product capabilities, and learning the end‑to‑end dynamics of media, monetization, and performance measurement.

Responsibilities

  • Contribute to the execution of the media product roadmap in alignment with strategic and commercial goals
  • Partner closely with the Media Commercial team to understand customer needs, market feedback, and go‑to‑market priorities
  • Translate product requirements into clear user stories and acceptance criteria to support engineering delivery
  • Collaborate with Product teams across Agent, Airline, and Corporate channels to support media display, attribution, and conversion tracking capabilities
  • Support Sales and Account teams with customer discussions, demos, and product collateral, and incorporate feedback into product planning
  • Help track product performance and customer outcomes through dashboards, reporting, and analysis
  • Participate in backlog prioritization, sprint planning, and ongoing delivery activities with engineering teams

Requirements

  • Experience in Product Management, product development, or delivery roles
  • Exposure to digital media, advertising platforms, or consumer‑facing products is preferred
  • Strong communication skills, with the ability to clearly articulate requirements and product value
  • Experience working with cross‑functional stakeholders across product, engineering, and commercial teams
  • Comfort operating in environments with evolving requirements and multiple dependencies
  • Analytical mindset with interest in using data to inform product decisions
  • Interest in media, advertising, and the technology that supports monetization and measurement
  • Ability to adapt to a fast-paced, dynamic environment and manage multiple priorities.

descriptionHtml:
Job Summary

Matterway is an AI Assistant helping operational teams in large enterprises by automating repetitive tasks and guiding decision making. Help us reinvent how teams work by putting cutting edge generative AI and automation tools into the hands of everyday business users. You will work across multiple products in the Matterway suite - a cloud platform for process optimization AI coding agents and specialized AI agents.

Responsibilities

We are looking for a Product Manager who loves talking to customers can translate fuzzy problems into crisp product bets and ships elegant software at a high velocity

What you will do

Senior Product Manager AI platform

Discover real problems

  • Run user interviews shadow user workflows and join sales and support calls
  • Synthesize pain points into actionable insights

Frame and shape opportunities

  • Frame problems by integrating user needs market dynamics and data driven signals and estimate the effort worth investing
  • Write lean PRDs or specs and sketch solutions in Figma or as quick prototypes
  • Coordinate with leadership and functional leads to evaluate prioritize and staff opportunities for execution

Steward the user experience

  • Champion intuitive functional and beautiful design across the product
  • Own UAT and partner with QA to uphold quality

Drive delivery

  • Maintain and groom the opportunity backlog
  • Coordinate with the engineering team to structure delivery plans align on scope and keep momentum by eliminating blockers swiftly
  • Keep a pulse on progress through transparent tracking and ensure the team stays on course toward high velocity delivery

Launch learn iterate

  • Orchestrate go live changelogs communications and enablement
  • Monitor post launch analytics and optimize for adoption

Level up how we work

  • Curate playbooks FAQs and internal wikis so new teammates hit the ground running
  • Continuously refine our tools and processes

Jump in where needed

  • Prompt engineer prototype test whatever moves the product forward. You are not afraid to get your hands dirty

What makes you a great fit

Must haves

  • Product Management track record You have led product cycles end to end in cross functional teams and shipped software in high velocity environments
  • Great product sense You know what good feels like and can explain the why.
  • Exceptional communication in English You craft crisp narratives and talk tech design and business with equal ease.
  • Interpersonal and Influence Skills skilled in facilitation stakeholder empathy expectation management and leading without authority
  • Technical fluency You can read code and understand technical constraints when making product decisions
  • AI native Strong understanding of AI technologies LLM principles and prompt engineering skills
  • A growth mindset Willingness to own problems. Comfort with ambiguity. A desire to make things better. A balanced sense of optimism and humility

Nice-to-haves

  • Proficient in Figma with a solid understanding of modern design systems
  • Industry experience in BFSI Procurement HR or in general with Enterprise internal workflows
  • Background in RPA BPM low-code or other automation domains
  • Dual degree or equivalent experience spanning Engineering and Business or Design.

title: Sr Product Manager, Shipping/Logistics
description: At eBay, we're more than a global ecommerce leader — we’re changing the way the world shops and sells. Our platform empowers millions of buyers and sellers in more than 190 markets around the world. We’re committed to pushing boundaries and leaving our mark as we reinvent the future of ecommerce for enthusiasts.Our customers are our compass, authenticity thrives, bold ideas are welcome, and everyone can bring their unique selves to work — every day. You’ll be part of a work culture that’s been genuinely committed to diversity and inclusion since its founding more than 20 years ago. Here, you can just be yourself, do your best work, and have a meaningful impact on people across the globe. We are looking for people with drive, ideas, and a passion for helping small businesses succeed to help shape the future of eBay—does this sound like you? If so, we’d love to talk to you!About The TeamWe are passionate about connecting buyers and sellers around the world and creating opportunities through commerce and technology. Ideally you will have previously developed global product strategies that enable and drive innovation and that have launched with meaningful results. You will work closely with our regional business leaders, product and domain leads to identify and build core capabilities, improve utility of features common to multiple key partners, and also solve for local conditions critical to market success.Key ResponsibilitiesDefine and execute product strategy and roadmap for Shipping tools backed up by user needs and data; have a global viewpoint and extend applications across use casesAs the Product Owner, provide clear product vision to your scrum team and co-lead the Agile scrum team with engineering counterpart to execute on roadmap with clear milestonesClearly set the product/backlog prioritisation with a balance of near-term deliverables and longer-term investment in technology platformsBe the product evangelist and partner closely with business and engineering leadersEffectively communicate strategies & trade-offs up to senior leaders and down to development teamJob RequirementsHands-on experience with agile development processExpertise and/or passion in technologies and products required to bring shipping and logistics solutions to market, at scale and globallyDesign, collect, analyse and benchmark product data to make decisions and business casesManage and optimise business processes to free up developers; do everything you can to speed up work that adds value to users directlyAsks the right questions to formulate product perspective and present requirementsBalances technical and business acumen; able to communicate what is possible and what will have the biggest impact on businessBuilds positive relationships internally and externally; an active listener and clear communicatorBasic Qualification7+ years of strong product management experienceExperience in shipping/logistics domain an advantageKnowledge of SQL and Tableau an advantagePast experience in product development or platform product management would be idealBenefitsBenefits are an essential part of your total compensation for the work you do every day. Whether you’re single, in a growing family, or nearing retirement, eBay offers a variety of comprehensive and competitive benefit programs to meet your needs. Including maternal & paternal leave, paid sabbatical, and plans to help ensure your financial security today and in the years ahead because we know feeling financially secure during your working years and through retirement is important.We love creating opportunities for others by connecting people from widely diverse backgrounds, perspectives, and geographies. So, being diverse and inclusive isn’t just something we strive for, it is who we are, and part of what we do each and every single day. We want to ensure that as an employee, you feel eBay is a place where, no matter who you are, you feel safe, included, and that you have the opportunity to bring your unique self to work.. descriptionHtml:
At eBay, we're more than a global ecommerce leader — we’re changing the way the world shops and sells. Our platform empowers millions of buyers and sellers in more than 190 markets around the world. We’re committed to pushing boundaries and leaving our mark as we reinvent the future of ecommerce for enthusiasts.

Our customers are our compass, authenticity thrives, bold ideas are welcome, and everyone can bring their unique selves to work — every day. We're in this together, sustaining the future of our customers, our company, and our planet.

Join a team of passionate thinkers, innovators, and dreamers — and help us connect people and build communities to create economic opportunity for all.

eBay is a global commerce leader that allows you to shape how the world buys, sells, and gives. You’ll be part of a work culture that’s been genuinely committed to diversity and inclusion since its founding more than 20 years ago. Here, you can just be yourself, do your best work, and have a meaningful impact on people across the globe. We are looking for people with drive, ideas, and a passion for helping small businesses succeed to help shape the future of eBay—does this sound like you? If so, we’d love to talk to you!

About The Team

We are passionate about connecting buyers and sellers around the world and creating opportunities through commerce and technology. Our responsibilities include all aspects of logistics, to empower sellers through state-of-the-art shipping tools.

About The Role

eBay is looking for an experienced Product Manager to execute and shape our shipping tools product strategy. Developing a platform to support and delight users from many distinct markets carries with it many challenges. Ideally you will have previously developed global product strategies that enable and drive innovation and that have launched with meaningful results. You will work closely with our regional business leaders, product and domain leads to identify and build core capabilities, improve utility of features common to multiple key partners, and also solve for local conditions critical to market success.

Key Responsibilities

  • Define and execute product strategy and roadmap for Shipping tools backed up by user needs and data; have a global viewpoint and extend applications across use cases
  • As the Product Owner, provide clear product vision to your scrum team and co-lead the Agile scrum team with engineering counterpart to execute on roadmap with clear milestones
  • Clearly set the product/backlog prioritisation with a balance of near-term deliverables and longer-term investment in technology platforms
  • Be the product evangelist and partner closely with business and engineering leaders
  • Effectively communicate strategies & trade-offs up to senior leaders and down to development team


Job Requirements

  • Hands-on experience with agile development process
  • Expertise and/or passion in technologies and products required to bring shipping and logistics solutions to market, at scale and globally
  • Design, collect, analyse and benchmark product data to make decisions and business cases
  • Manage and optimise business processes to free up developers; do everything you can to speed up work that adds value to users directly
  • Asks the right questions to formulate product perspective and present requirements
  • Balances technical and business acumen; able to communicate what is possible and what will have the biggest impact on business
  • Builds positive relationships internally and externally; an active listener and clear communicator


Basic Qualification

  • 7+ years of strong product management experience
  • Experience in shipping/logistics domain an advantage
  • Knowledge of SQL and Tableau an advantage
  • Past experience in product development or platform product management would be ideal


Benefits

Benefits are an essential part of your total compensation for the work you do every day. Whether you’re single, in a growing family, or nearing retirement, eBay offers a variety of comprehensive and competitive benefit programs to meet your needs. Including maternal & paternal leave, paid sabbatical, and plans to help ensure your financial security today and in the years ahead because we know feeling financially secure during your working years and through retirement is important.

We love creating opportunities for others by connecting people from widely diverse backgrounds, perspectives, and geographies. So, being diverse and inclusive isn’t just something we strive for, it is who we are, and part of what we do each and every single day. We want to ensure that as an employee, you feel eBay is a place where, no matter who you are, you feel safe, included, and that you have the opportunity to bring your unique self to work.. To learn about our Diversity & Inclusion click here: https://www.ebayinc.com/our-company/diversity-inclusion/.

Please see the Talent Privacy Notice for information regarding how eBay handles your personal data collected when you use the eBay Careers website or apply for a job with eBay.

eBay is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, veteran status, and disability, or other legally protected status. If you have a need that requires accommodation, please contact us at talent@ebay.com. We will make every effort to respond to your request for accommodation as soon as possible. View our accessibility statement to learn more about eBay's commitment to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities.

The eBay Jobs website uses cookies to enhance your experience. By continuing to browse the site, you agree to our use of cookies. Visit our Privacy Center for more information.

descriptionHtml:
At eBay, we're more than a global ecommerce leader — we’re changing the way the world shops and sells. Our platform empowers millions of buyers and sellers in more than 190 markets around the world. We’re committed to pushing boundaries and leaving our mark as we reinvent the future of ecommerce for enthusiasts.

Our customers are our compass, authenticity thrives, bold ideas are welcome, and everyone can bring their unique selves to work — every day. We're in this together, sustaining the future of our customers, our company, and our planet.

Join a team of passionate thinkers, innovators, and dreamers — and help us connect people and build communities to create economic opportunity for all.

About The Team And The Role

Identity is foundational to how users safely access and interact with eBay’s global marketplace. The Identity team owns the core systems and workflows that power account creation, authentication, account security, different account models and trust signals across millions of buyers and sellers worldwide. As eBay continues to evolve its platform and expand its ecosystem, identity is increasingly delivered as a platform capability (Identity-as-a-Service) that enables secure and seamless experiences across products, devices, and partners and evolves from single-user accounts to multi-user, role-based identity systems supporting families and teams.

We are looking for a Lead Product Manager to help shape the next generation of identity capabilities at eBay. This role sits at the intersection of security, platform infrastructure, and user experience, driving innovations in authentication, identity signals, risk mitigation, and account protection. As identity technologies evolve, we are also exploring how AI can enhance identity verification, fraud detection, and user trust signals, making this an exciting opportunity to define the future of identity at scale. This role requires deep understanding of identity systems and modern authentication patterns, balancing seamless user access with strong security and risk controls.

What You Will Accomplish

  • Define product direction and drive outcomes across the identity lifecycle, including registration, sign-in, authentication, account recovery, and identity security.
  • Own and evolve product strategy for key identity initiatives that balance seamless user experience with strong security and risk controls.
  • Build and scale identity platform capabilities that support multiple teams, products, and services across eBay.
  • Partner closely with engineering, security, privacy, trust & safety, and risk teams to deliver secure and resilient identity systems.
  • Drive clarity on product goals, sequencing, and trade-offs across multiple identity use cases.
  • Improve user access and authentication experiences while strengthening protections against account abuse, fraud, and compromise.
  • Use data, experimentation, and customer insights to identify friction points and prioritize improvements across the identity journey.
  • Ensure identity experiences remain trusted, compliant, and scalable globally.


What You Will Bring

  • 10+ years of product management experience, ideally in Identity, Authentication, Platform, Security, or Trust & Safety domains.
  • Experience building or scaling products in areas such as registration, login/authentication, identity verification, account security, or risk prevention. Familiarity with Identity-as-a-Service (IDaaS) concepts and modern authentication architectures and systems supporting multiple user roles, delegated access, and account governance.
  • Strong product judgment and ability to operate across complex, multi-stakeholder environments.
  • Comfort owning horizontal platform capabilities used by multiple teams at eBay and its subsidiaries
  • Technical fluency and ability to collaborate effectively with senior engineering partners on system design and platform architecture.
  • Experience operating in global, high-trust, or regulated environments.
  • Clear communicator who can operate at both strategy and execution levels.
  • Demonstrated leadership ability with strong ownership and ability to drive initiatives end-to-end.


Interest in leveraging AI/ML to improve identity signals, authentication flows, or fraud detection

Additional Details

eBay is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, veteran status, and disability, or other legally protected status. If you have a need that requires accommodation, please contact us at talent@ebay.com. We will make every effort to respond to your request for accommodation as soon as possible. View our accessibility statement to learn more about eBay's commitment to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities.

We use cookies to enhance your experience and may use AI tools for administrative tasks in the hiring process. To learn how we handle your personal data and use AI responsibly, please visit our Talent Privacy Notice, Privacy Center, and AI Hiring Guidelines.

descriptionHtml:
Pluxee is a global player in employee benefits and engagement that operates in 28 countries. Pluxee helps companies attract, engage, and retain talent thanks to a broad range of solutions across Meal & Food, Wellbeing, Lifestyle, Reward & Recognition, and Public Benefits.


Powered by leading technology and more than 5,000 engaged team members, Pluxee acts as a trusted partner within a highly interconnected B2B2C ecosystem made up of more than 500,000 clients, 36 million consumers and 1.7 million merchants.


Conducting its business as a trusted partner for more than 45 years, Pluxee is committed to creating a positive impact on all its stakeholders, from driving business to local communities, to supporting wellbeing at work for employees while protecting the planet.


🚀 Your next challenge:

Our product offering suite is core to our business. Within the Pluxee universe, India has one of the most mature and rich product suite. We’ve also an established work practice in place where all aspects from Product Management to Marketing are managed by an expert team. Additionally, with this role, you will be part of a globalized tribe responsible for product management & marketing.


Main missions:

Context and Main Issues:

Main missions

  • Building brand preference and creation of value proposition for Pluxee' s product suite in India
  • Grow the adoption rate among existing clients
  • Achieve revenue targets for Pluxee product portfolio in India
  • Develop & execute comprehensive marketing campaigns for managed suite of benefits
  • Actively manage the product roadmap and drive cross-functional projects to develop the product.
  • Analyse needs of clients and design communication programs
  • Participate in client pitches and RFPs as a product specialist
  • Work with the sales & affiliate teams to drive business growth
  • Competition and market Analysis
  • Anchor key long-term initiatives for country


Context and Main Issues:

  • Responsible for Marketing the product suite offered by the brand
  • Work on the positioning, value proposition & activation for the brand
  • Be close to the market, understand the needs of the Customer and design innovative plans to meet those expectations of clients and consumers
  • Create and execute brand communication campaigns, build & strengthen the brand’s equity over a period and drive awareness & purchase intent for the brand
  • Develop marketing campaigns to deliver on business objectives and work collaboratively with diversified teams to create & manage integrated marketing strategies
  • Have a knack for data analysis and reporting
  • Be able to participate in client discussions as product specialist with a solutions mindset
  • Ability to create a roadmap, approach and liaise with partners
  • Market sizing and ongoing market intelligence


🌟 You’re a match:


  • MBA in Marketing from a good business school.
  • At least 8+ years’ experience in Product Management/ Marketing
  • Excellent analytical skills including usage of tools like MS office suite (esp Excel & Powerpoint), Power BI (preferred)
  • Should be conversant or have a penchant to learn digital tools
  • Working understanding of digital marketing preferred
  • Experience in the B2B service industry in a marketing role would be an added advantage
  • Should be able to conceptualise solutions for different segment needs that exist in the market
  • The person should have good interpersonal skills and should be able to work with cross-functional teams
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills. Be able to participate in client meetings/ pitches
  • Ability to drive market sizing and ongoing market intelligence



🔎 To get this challenge:


  • Telephonic/Video call discussion with TA Partner.
  • Telephonic/Video call discussion with Director - Product & Marketing.
  • Face-to-Face interview with Director - Product & Marketing
  • Face-to-Face interview with Human Resources Director.


🏅 Your team

  • Product team mapped to the Product & Marketing organization globally


📍 Your Location:

  • Preferred: Mumbai, IN


☀️ Happy at work:


1) A meaningful job: Be the change! Help us build the future of employee benefits by bringing to life sustainable and personalized experiences and contribute to make a real impact on millions of lives. Our business model delivers not just for individuals but their communities too, by supporting local businesses and economies.

2) A great culture: People matter – a lot! Be part of a multicultural team that moves as one in a fast paced and innovative environment. We respect and care authentically about our people, we embrace wellbeing and work-life balance, new ideas and we have a lot of fun!

3) An empowering environment: Be yourself! At Pluxee we proudly embrace diversity and value the uniqueness of our talents, fostering an inclusive workplace where all abilities are celebrated, and equal learning and growing opportunities are a given.

descriptionHtml:
Wati is the world's leading WhatsApp-first conversational growth platform, empowering businesses to build deeper customer relationships and accelerate revenue growth.

Trusted and loved by over 16,000 customers across 190+ countries, Wati has established itself as the premier choice for businesses leveraging WhatsApp and other messaging channels to connect with customers on their platform of choice.

In a world where real-time interactions drive growth, Wati's story is all about business growth through conversations. At Wati, we believe that every conversation matters, whether it's engaging a first-time prospect, nurturing a qualified lead, or deepening relationships with loyal clients. We transform these conversations into opportunities for building relationships, and strong relationships lead to increased revenue.

Our Platform

The AI-native platform simplifies complex business operations by bringing all customer interactions under one intelligent roof. Designed for scalability and ease of use, our solution delivers a measurable ROI while adapting to businesses of all sizes, from emerging startups to established enterprises.

Our Backing & Partnerships

Wati is proudly backed by world-class investors including Tiger Global, Sequoia Capital, DST Global, and Shopify. As a Premium-tier Partner of Meta, Google, and WhatsApp, we maintain the highest standards of integration and platform excellence.

Role Overview

Wati is experiencing rapid growth and we are looking to hire a Senior Product Manager for our PLG team to own and drive activation, retention & expansion, build a roadmap of experiments and execute quickly to show real business impact. We are looking for extremely entrepreneurial PMs who value moving quickly.

If you have demonstrated experience in growth teams, worked in PLG products and want to unlock the potential for messaging to serve millions of customers, we would be excited to hear from you.

This will be an opportunity for you to build experiences that thousands of small businesses use on a daily basis, and to be a key part of this high growth journey.

What you'll do:

  • Track and benchmark activation, retention, and expansion metrics across customer segments — and use AI to surface patterns and anomalies faster than traditional analysis
  • Hypothesize, test, and iterate on growth experiments; measure their impact and feed learnings back into the roadmap
  • Build and run personalization and nudge systems that use AI to deliver the right message, to the right user, at the right moment in their journey
  • Drive new growth experiments end-to-end — from framing the hypothesis to aligning stakeholders, executing with cross-functional teams, and measuring outcomes
  • Work with domain PMs to connect activation and retention signals to specific use cases, and influence their roadmaps with data-backed recommendations
  • Bring AI into growth workflows — from insight generation and cohort analysis to automated experiment readouts and predictive churn signals
  • Understand the messaging ecosystem, market dynamics, and competitive landscape to inform where growth bets should be placed
  • Collaborate closely with Engineering, Marketing, UX, and Customer teams to move fast and learn faster

Requirements

  • 4-5+ years of experience as a Growth PM or Product Analyst in a B2B SaaS environment
  • Demonstrated experience identifying the levers that move a metric and running rigorous A/B tests
  • Hands-on experience with AI tools for analysis, personalization, or workflow automation — you bring AI into how you work, not just what you ship
  • Strong comfort with data — working directly with raw datasets, writing queries, and using analytics tools like Amplitude, Heap, or Mixpanel
  • Experience designing or influencing personalization systems, behavioral nudges, or lifecycle engagement flows
  • Ability to influence cross-functional stakeholders without direct authority
  • Clear, compelling communication — written, verbal, and in presentations
  • An eye for design — you can spot a friction point in a flow and know what good looks like
  • Comfort holding your own in technical conversations with engineers and data scientists
  • Creative problem-solving grounded in customer empathy, not just funnel metrics

Nice to have:

  • Experience at a startup or high-growth scaleup
  • Coding or SQL experience — you don't need to ship code, but you can read it and get your own answers from data
  • Familiarity with the messaging, CPaaS, or WhatsApp ecosystem
  • Bachelor's in Computer Science or a related technical field

To learn more about how we work globally and regionally, check out: https://careers.toasttab.com/locations-toast.Apply today!Toast is committed to creating an accessible and inclusive hiring process. descriptionHtml:
Toast is a revolutionary company where "going against the grain" is in our DNA. We empower the restaurant community to thrive by pairing deep industry expertise with powerful cloud-based software and restaurant-grade hardware.

As an Enterprise Senior Product Manager, you will lead teams dedicated to solving mission-critical technology challenges for Toast’s largest and most complex customers. You will drive the roadmap and delivery of strategic features, integrations, and platform offerings that unlock long-term business value.

About this Roll:*

  • Strategy & Roadmap: Own the long-term strategic roadmap to improve product-market fit for Enterprise and Mid-Market customers.
  • Agile Execution: Actively manage backlogs through creation, prioritization, and grooming of user stories in a fast-paced environment.
  • Tech Savvy: Experience defining technical requirements for APIs, webhooks, and data models to support complex integrations
  • Operational Excellence: Monitor process and system health metrics to ensure optimal quality and delivery velocity.
  • Stakeholder Management: Update internal and external stakeholders on roadmap progress and collaborate with R&D Enablement to communicate product updates. Ability to speak the same language as client and enterprise development teams, CTOs and architects.
  • Cross-Functional Leadership: Partner with GTM teams (Sales, Marketing, Solutions) and evangelize product capabilities across the broader R&D organization.

Do you have the right ingredients?*

  • Experience: 7+ years of senior-level Product Management experience, specifically within the Enterprise software lifecycle—from ideation to delivery.
  • Collaboration: Proven track record of working directly with customers, external development teams, and business partners to ensure alignment.
  • Soft Skills: Strong program management and communication skills with a bias toward action.
  • Problem Solving: Ability to prioritize workloads, meet deadlines, and solve complex problems using analytical skills.
  • Relationship Building: Experience driving cross-team initiatives and building relationships across diverse personalities.

Special Sauce:

  • Customer Mastery: Background in software development, account management or client development for Enterprise customers.
  • Influence: Ability to lead through advocacy and influence without direct authority.
  • Domain Expertise: Knowledge of the restaurant and hospitality industry a plus; familiarity with Enterprise security standards (SSO, OAuth) and large-scale data architecture

AI at Toast

At Toast, one of our company values is that we're hungry to build and learn. We believe learning new AI tools empowers us to build for our customers faster, more independently, and with higher quality. We provide these tools across all disciplines, from Engineering and Product to Sales and Support, and are inspired by how our Toasters are already driving real value with them. The people who thrive here are those who embrace changes that let us build more for our customers; it’s a core part of our culture.

Our Total Rewards Philosophy

We strive to provide competitive compensation and benefits programs that help to attract, retain, and motivate the best and brightest people in our industry. Our total rewards package goes beyond great earnings potential and provides the means to a healthy lifestyle with the flexibility to meet Toasters’ changing needs. Learn more about our benefits at https://careers.toasttab.com/toast-benefits.

How Toast Uses AI In Its Hiring Process

Throughout the hiring process, our goal is to get to know you. We use AI tools to support our recruiters and interviewers with tasks like note-taking, summarization, and documentation of interviews to ensure they can be fully focused on your conversation. All hiring decisions are made by people. To learn more: https://careers.toasttab.com/ai-in-hiring

Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is Baked into our Recipe for Success

At Toast, our employees are our secret ingredient—when they thrive, we thrive. The restaurant industry is one of the most diverse, and we embrace that diversity with authenticity, inclusivity, respect, and humility. By embedding these principles into our culture and design, we create equitable opportunities for all and raise the bar in delivering exceptional experiences.

We Thrive Together

We embrace a hybrid work model that fosters in-person collaboration while valuing individual needs. Our goal is to build a strong culture of connection as we work together to empower the restaurant community. To learn more about how we work globally and regionally, check out: https://careers.toasttab.com/locations-toast.

Apply today!

Toast is committed to creating an accessible and inclusive hiring process. As part of this commitment, we strive to provide reasonable accommodations for persons with disabilities to enable them to access the hiring process. If you need an accommodation to access the job application or interview process, please contact candidateaccommodations@toasttab.com.



    • For roles in the United States, it is unlawful in Massachusetts to require or administer a lie detector test as a condition of employment or continued employment. An employer who violates this law shall be subject to criminal penalties and civil liability.

descriptionHtml:
Company Description

Ready to make a difference? Experian has evolved into a global tech company and specialized in data and analytics. We're passionate about unlocking the power of data to transform lives and create opportunities for consumers, businesses and society. We're a member of the FTSE 30 and for more than 125 years we've helped economies and communities flourish – and we're not done.

Discover the Unexpected - Our 22k amazing employees in 30+ countries believe the possibilities for you, and the world, are growing. We're investing in the future, through new technologies, experienced people and new ideas so we can help create a better tomorrow. To do this we employ 'big-thinkers' that share our purpose #uniquelyexperian

Job Description

The Principal GenAI Product Manager EMAP will be responsible for shaping and executing Experian EMAP’s AI‑enhanced product strategy across the Ascend and Fraud portfolios.

This is a specialist role in the EMAP Product Management team. The role focuses on embedding Generative AI capabilities into core products, reimagining customer propositions, accelerating innovation, and driving adoption across diverse EMAP markets.

Operating horizontally across Product, Engineering, Data Science, Client Delivery, and Market Product teams, the role acts as a bridge between global GenAI strategy, regional priorities, and market execution.

The Ideal Individual Will Bring

  • Disruptive mindset
  • Deep understanding of generative AI technologies
  • Strong product instincts
  • Ability to convert opportunities into scalable, commercially viable features aligned to Experian’s product operating model

What You’ll Do

GenAI Product Strategy & Direction

  • Own the regional GenAI product strategy and roadmap for EMAP across Ascend and Fraud, informed by:
    • EMAP customer VOC and market needs
    • Regional regulatory and risk considerations
    • Global GenAI platforms, priorities, and capabilities
  • Identify where Generative AI can materially improve customer outcomes, product differentiation, and operational efficiency.
  • Translate emerging GenAI capabilities into clear product intent, priorities, and roadmaps.
Product Discovery & Productisation

  • Lead discovery of high‑impact GenAI opportunities across customer journeys and internal product workflows.
  • Define use cases with clear value hypotheses, success measures, and risk considerations.
  • Drive productisation of GenAI capabilities, moving from concept and proof points into scalable, production‑ready features embedded in core products.
  • Ensure solutions are designed for repeatability, supportability, and regional scale, rather than bespoke delivery.

Scaling & Adoption Across EMAP

  • Work with markets and regional functions to scale GenAI use cases across EMAP, with primary focus on customer‑facing innovation and considering productivity enablement where it supports product outcomes
  • Define how GenAI capabilities will be adopted, measured, and evolved over time across markets.
  • Track outcomes including adoption, productivity gains, customer impact, and product differentiation.

Embedding GenAI into Core Platforms

  • Partner with Engineering and Data Science to embed GenAI capabilities into existing Ascend and Fraud products, rather than standalone tools.
  • Ensure GenAI features are explainable and auditable by design; aligned to Experian’s product operating model and naturally integrated into customer and analyst workflows
  • Balance rapid innovation with long‑term platform integrity, trust, and regulatory compliance

Cross‑Functional & GTM Collaboration

  • Act as a senior product partner across Engineering, Architecture, Data Science, Client Delivery, Market Product, and regional GTM teams.
  • Collaborate with GTM to shape AI‑driven value propositions, pricing inputs, and adoption models, ensuring clear and responsible client messaging.
  • Influence prioritisation and solution design through strong product judgement, evidence‑based trade‑offs, and clear articulation of customer and commercial value.
  • Operate effectively in a matrixed, global environment without formal line authority.

Governance, Risk & Responsible AI

  • Work closely with regional and global AI technology teams to ensure GenAI governance, controls, and guardrails are embedded into product design and delivery.
  • Ensure GenAI product capabilities align with:
  • Product development and risk frameworks
  • Legal, compliance, and regulatory requirements across EMAP
  • Responsible AI principles (fairness, transparency, traceability)

Client Co‑Creation & Ecosystem Engagement

  • Co‑create GenAI capabilities with selected clients to validate value, usability, and adoption.
  • Partner with global technology and AI platform teams to leverage external GenAI providers where appropriate, in line with Experian standards and governance.

GenAI Thought Leadership & Storytelling

  • Act as an internal GenAI product ambassador for EMAP.
  • Share success stories, learnings, and impact narratives to support alignment, adoption, and momentum across product teams and markets

What Success Looks Like

  • GenAI capabilities embedded into EMAP products at scale, not isolated pilots
  • Tangible improvements in customer decision quality, speed, and usability
  • Clear, aligned GenAI priorities across product teams and markets
  • Innovation delivered responsibly, maintaining Experian’s standards of trust and compliance

Qualifications

What You’ll Bring

  • Significant experience as a Senior Product Manager / Principal PM in complex software, platform, or data‑driven environments.
  • Strong grounding in product discovery, productisation, and outcome‑based prioritisation.
  • Deep understanding of Generative AI concepts, patterns, and limitations.
  • Ability to translate AI capabilities into practical, customer‑ready product features.
  • Proven ability to lead through influence rather than hierarchy.
  • Strong communication skills with senior stakeholders and technical teams.
  • Experience operating in regulated or high‑trust environments is highly advantageous.

Additional Information

Our uniqueness is that we celebrate yours. Experian's culture and people are important differentiators. We take our people agenda very seriously and focus on what matters; DEI, work/life balance, development, authenticity, engagement, collaboration, wellness, reward and recognition, volunteering... the list goes on. Experian's people first approach is award-winning; Great Place To Work™ in 24 countries, FORTUNE Best Companies to work and Glassdoor Best Places to Work (globally 4.4 Stars) to name a few. Check out Experian Life on social or our Careers Site to understand why.

Experian is proud to be an Equal Opportunity and Affirmative Action employer. Innovation is a critical part of Experian's DNA and practices, and our diverse workforce drives our success. Everyone can succeed at Experian and bring their whole self to work, irrespective of their gender, ethnicity, religion, colour, sexuality, physical ability or age. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know at the earliest opportunity.

Experian Careers - Creating a better tomorrow together

Find out what its like to work for Experian by clicking here

Experian Careers - Creating a better tomorrow together

Find out what its like to work for Experian by clicking here

You'll spend significant time in the data yourself—validating hypotheses, understanding detection performance, and ensuring that automation investments deliver measurable impact against evolving attack patterns.Key Responsibilities Product Strategy & RoadmapIdentify and prioritize automation opportunities based on attack trends, operational efficiency gains, and customer impact. descriptionHtml:
Job Title - Senior Product Manager

Job Location - Pune, Maharashtra

MUST Have Skills - Exp in building internal tools, ML models, and complex systems (e.g., pricing models, recommendation/discord systems), Exp in tools like Claude Code within dev environments to build prototypes and run analysis.


Role Overview

Our client is looking for a Product Manager to own and drive automation within the detection and mitigation systems. This role sits at the intersection of product strategy, data analysis, and machine learning operations, you'll be responsible for identifying opportunities to automate threat response, validating those opportunities through rigorous data analysis, and working closely with data scientists and engineers to bring automation solutions to production.


This is a hands-on, technically-oriented PM role. You'll spend significant time in the data yourself—validating hypotheses, understanding detection performance, and ensuring that automation investments deliver measurable impact against evolving attack patterns.


Key Responsibilities

Product Strategy & Roadmap

  • Identify and prioritize automation opportunities based on attack trends, operational efficiency gains, and customer impact.
  • Define success metrics and track performance of automation features post-launch
  • Build business cases grounded in quantitative evidence—expected detection improvements, false positive trade-offs, operational cost reductions

Data Analysis & Opportunity Validation

  • Conduct hands-on analysis of detection data, traffic patterns, and attack signatures to identify automation opportunities
  • Work with telemetry and truth data to validate that proposed automation will perform as expected before engineering investment

Cross-Functional Collaboration

  • Partner with ML researchers & analysts to translate detection research into productized automation capabilities Work with engineering teams to scope, prioritize, and deliver automation features on schedule
  • Collaborate with SOC and customer-facing teams to understand operational pain points and incorporate feedback into product direction

Stakeholder Engagement

  • Communicate automation strategy and progress to executives, customers, and internal stakeholders
  • Gather customer feedback and market insights to inform product direction
  • Support sales and solutions teams with technical context on automation capabilities

Must Have

  • 5+ years of product management experience in security, fraud prevention, or data-intensive B2B SaaS products
  • Strong data analysis capability you're comfortable writing SQL, analyzing large datasets, and drawing actionable conclusions from ambiguous data
  • Experience working with ML/data science teams: you understand how models are trained, validated, and deployed, and can translate research into product requirements

Hands-On Technical Drive:

  • You are able to leverage LLMs and tools like Claude Code for analysis, prototyping and understanding code, and take ownership of complex problems, driving solutions forward with resourcefulness and urgency

Technical fluency:

  • Able to engage deeply with engineers on system design, trade-offs, and feasibility
  • Proven ability to define and ship products from concept through launch, with measurable business impact

Excellent communication skills:

  • Able to articulate complex technical concepts to diverse audiences and build alignment across stakeholders

Nice to Have

  • Experience in bot detection, fraud prevention, or cybersecurity domain
  • Familiarity with detection systems, classification pipelines, or anomaly detection
  • Proficiency with data tools beyond SQL (Python, notebooks, visualization tools)
  • Experience with Agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban) and tools like JIRA/Confluence

Advanced degree in a technical or business field

This is a hybrid role based in Pune, India, with an expectation of three days per week in office. Relocation assistance is provided for candidates outside of Pune.
